question: $$	ext{A train running at the speed of 60 km/hr crosses a pole in 9 seconds. What is the length of the train?}$$ A. $$	ext{120 metres}$$ B. $$	ext{180 metres}$$ C. $$	ext{324 m}$$ D. $$	ext{150 metres}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$
	ext{Speed} =  rac{60 	imes 5}{18/3} 	ext{ m/sec} = 50 	ext{ m/sec}.
$$

$$
	ext{Length of the train} = 	ext{Speed} 	imes 	ext{Time} = 50 	imes 9 	imes  rac{1}{3} 	ext{ m} = 150 	ext{ m}.
$$

question: $$	ext{A train 125 m long passes a man, running at 5 km/hr in the same direction in which the train is going, in 10 seconds. The speed of the train is:}$$ A. $$	ext{45 km/hr}$$ B. $$	ext{50 km/hr}$$ C. $$	ext{54 km/hr}$$ D. $$	ext{55 km/hr}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$ 	ext{Speed of the train relative to man} = \left( rac{125}{10}ight) 	ext{m/sec} = \left( rac{25}{2}ight) 	ext{m/sec} = \left( rac{25 	imes 18}{2 	imes 5}ight) 	ext{km/hr} = 45 	ext{km/hr}. $$

Let the speed of the train be $x$ km/hr. Then, relative speed = $(x - 5)$ km/hr.

$$ x - 5 = 45 \quad \Rightarrow \quad x = 50 	ext{km/hr}. $$

question: $$	ext{The length of the bridge, which a train 130 metres long and travelling at 45 km/hr can cross in 30 seconds, is:}$$ A. $$	ext{200 m}$$ B. $$	ext{225 m}$$ C. $$	ext{245 m}$$ D. $$	ext{250 m}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$ 	ext{Speed} =  rac{45 	imes 5}{18} =  rac{25}{2} 	ext{ m/sec}. $$

$$ 	ext{Time} = 30 	ext{ sec}. $$

$$ 	ext{Let the length of bridge be } x 	ext{ metres}. $$

$$ 	ext{Then,}  rac{130 + x}{30} =  rac{25}{2} $$

$$ \Rightarrow 2(130 + x) = 750 $$

$$ \Rightarrow x = 245 	ext{ m}. $$

question: $$	ext{Two trains running in opposite directions cross a man standing on the platform in 27 seconds and 17 seconds respectively and they cross each other in 23 seconds. The ratio of their speeds is:}$$ A. $$	ext{1 : 3}$$ B. $$ rac{3}{2}$$ C. $$ rac{3}{4}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the speeds of the two trains be } x 	ext{ m/sec and } y 	ext{ m/sec respectively.}$$
$$	ext{Then, length of the first train = } 27x 	ext{ metres,}$$
$$	ext{and length of the second train = } 17y 	ext{ metres.}$$
$$ rac{27x + 17y}{x + y} = 23$$
$$27x + 17y = 23x + 23y$$
$$4x = 6y$$
$$ rac{x}{y} =  rac{3}{2}$$

question: $$	ext{A train passes a station platform in 36 seconds and a man standing on the platform in 20 seconds. If the speed of the train is 54 km/hr, what is the length of the platform?}$$ A. $$	ext{120 m}$$ B. $$	ext{240 m}$$ C. $$	ext{300 m}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Speed} =  rac{54 	imes 5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} = 15 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Length of the train} = (15 	imes 20) 	ext{ m} = 300 	ext{ m}.$$

$$	ext{Let the length of the platform be } x 	ext{ metres}.$$

$$	ext{Then, }  rac{x + 300}{36} = 15.$$

$$	ext{Therefore, } x + 300 = 540.$$

$$	ext{Hence, } x = 240 	ext{ m}.$$

question: $$6.	ext{ A train 240 m long passes a pole in 24 seconds. How long will it take to pass a platform 650 m long?}$$ A. $$	ext{65 sec}$$ B. $$	ext{89 sec}$$ C. $$	ext{100 sec}$$ D. $$	ext{150 sec}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$
	ext{Speed} =  rac{240}{24} 	ext{ m/sec} = 10 	ext{ m/sec}.
$$

$$
	ext{Required time} =  rac{240 + 650}{10} 	ext{ sec} = 89 	ext{ sec}.
$$

question: $$	ext{7. Two trains of equal length are running on parallel lines in the same direction at 46 km/hr and 36 km/hr. The faster train passes the slower train in 36 seconds. The length of each train is:}$$ A. $$	ext{50 m}$$ B. $$	ext{72 m}$$ C. $$	ext{80 m}$$ D. $$	ext{82 m}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the length of each train be } x 	ext{ metres.}$$
$$	ext{Then, distance covered = } 2x 	ext{ metres.}$$
$$	ext{Relative speed = }(46 - 36) 	ext{ km/hr}$$
$$= \left(10 	imes  rac{x}{1000}ight) 	imes  rac{1000}{5} 	ext{ m/sec}$$
$$=  rac{10x}{18} 	ext{ m/sec}$$
$$=  rac{25}{9} 	ext{ m/sec}$$
$$ rac{2x}{1} =  rac{25}{9} 	imes 36$$
$$\Rightarrow 2x = 100$$
$$\Rightarrow x = 50.$$

question: $$	ext{A train 360 m long is running at a speed of 45 km/hr. In what time will it pass a bridge 140 m long?}$$ A. $$	ext{40 sec}$$ B. $$	ext{42 sec}$$ C. $$	ext{45 sec}$$ D. $$	ext{48 sec}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Formula for converting from km/hr to m/s: } X 	ext{ km/hr} =  rac{X 	imes 5}{18} 	ext{ m/s}.$$

$$	ext{Therefore, Speed} =  rac{45 	imes 5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} = 25 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Total distance to be covered} = (360 + 140) 	ext{ m} = 500 	ext{ m}.$$

$$	ext{Formula for finding Time} =  rac{	ext{Distance}}{	ext{Speed}}.$$

$$	ext{Required time} =  rac{500 	imes 2}{25} 	ext{ sec} = 40 	ext{ sec}.$$

question: $$	ext{9. Two trains are moving in opposite directions at 60 km/hr and 90 km/hr. Their lengths are 1.10 km and 0.9 km respectively. The time taken by the slower train to cross the faster train in seconds is:}$$ A. $$	ext{36}$$ B. $$45$$ C. $$	ext{48}$$ D. $$	ext{49}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Relative speed} = (60+ 90) 	ext{ km/hr}$$

$$= \left(150 	imes  rac{5}{18}ight) 	ext{ m/sec}$$

$$= \left( rac{125}{3}ight) 	ext{ m/sec}$$

$$	ext{Distance covered} = (1.10 + 0.9) 	ext{ km} = 2 	ext{ km} = 2000 	ext{ m}$$

$$	ext{Required time} = \left( rac{2000 	imes 3}{125}ight) 	ext{ sec} = 48 	ext{ sec}$$

question: $$	ext{A jogger running at 9 kmph alongside a railway track in 240 metres ahead of the engine of a 120 metres long train running at 45 kmph in the same direction. In how much time will the train pass the jogger?}$$ A. $$	ext{3.6 sec}$$ B. $$	ext{18 sec}$$ C. $$	ext{36 sec}$$ D. $$	ext{72 sec}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Speed of train relative to jogger} = (45 - 9) 	ext{ km/hr} = 36 	ext{ km/hr}.$$
$$36 	ext{ km/hr} = 36 	imes  rac{5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} = 10 	ext{ m/sec}.$$
$$	ext{Distance to be covered} = (240 + 120) 	ext{ m} = 360 	ext{ m}.$$
$$	ext{Time taken} =  rac{360}{10} 	ext{ sec} = 36 	ext{ sec}.$$

question: $$	ext{11. A 270 metres long train running at the speed of 120 kmph crosses another train running in opposite direction at the speed of 80 kmph in 9 seconds. What is the length of the other train?}$$ A. $$	ext{230 m}$$ B. $$	ext{240 m}$$ C. $$	ext{260 m}$$ D. $$	ext{320 m}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$Relative\ speed = (120 + 80) km/hr$$
$$= \left(200 	imes  rac{5}{18}ight) m/sec$$
$$= \left( rac{500}{9}ight) m/sec.$$

Let the length of the other train be \(x\) metres.

Then, \(x + 270 =  rac{500}{9}\).

\(x + 270 = 500\).

\(x = 230\).

question: $$	ext{12. A goods train runs at the speed of 72 kmph and crosses a 250 m long platform in 26 seconds. What is the length of the goods train?}$$ A. $$	ext{230 m}$$ B. $$	ext{240 m}$$ C. $$	ext{260 m}$$ D. $$	ext{270 m}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Speed} =  rac{72 	imes 5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} = 20 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Time} = 26 	ext{ sec}.$$

$$	ext{Let the length of the train be } x 	ext{ metres}.$$

$$	ext{Then, }  rac{x + 250}{26} = 20.$$

$$	ext{Therefore, } x + 250 = 520.$$

$$	ext{Hence, } x = 270.$$

question: $$	ext{13. Two trains, each 100 m long, moving in opposite directions, cross each other in 8 seconds. If one is moving twice as fast the other, then the speed of the faster train is:}$$ A. $$	ext{30 km/hr}$$ B. $$	ext{45 km/hr}$$ C. $$	ext{60 km/hr}$$ D. $$	ext{75 km/hr}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the speed of the slower train be } x 	ext{ m/sec.}$$
$$	ext{Then, speed of the faster train = } 2x 	ext{ m/sec.}$$
$$	ext{Relative speed = }(x + 2x) 	ext{ m/sec = } 3x 	ext{ m/sec.}$$
$$(100 + 100) = 3x \cdot 8$$
$$24x = 200$$
$$x =  rac{25}{3}$$
$$	ext{So, speed of the faster train = } 50 	ext{ m/sec}$$
$$	ext{   = } \left(50 \cdot  rac{18}{5}ight) 	ext{ km/hr}$$
$$	ext{   = 60 km/hr.}$$

question: $$	ext{14. Two trains 140 m and 160 m long run at the speed of 60 km/hr and 40 km/hr respectively in opposite directions on parallel tracks. The time (in seconds) which they take to cross each other, is:}$$ A. $$9$$ B. $$9.6$$ C. $$10$$ D. $$10.8$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: ```tex
$$
	ext{Relative speed} = (60 + 40) 	ext{ km/hr} = \left(100 	imes  rac{5}{18}ight) 	ext{ m/sec} = \left( rac{250}{9}ight) 	ext{ m/sec}.
$$

$$
	ext{Distance covered in crossing each other} = (140 + 160) 	ext{ m} = 300 	ext{ m}.
$$

$$
	ext{Required time} = \left( rac{300 	imes 9}{250}ight) 	ext{ sec} = 10.8 	ext{ sec}.
$$
```

question: $$	ext{15. A train 110 meters long is running with a speed of 60 km/h. In what time will it pass a man who is running at 6 km/h in the direction opposite to that in which the train is going?}$$ A. $$	ext{5 sec}$$ B. $$	ext{6 sec}$$ C. $$	ext{7 sec}$$ D. $$	ext{10 sec}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Speed of train relative to man} = (60 + 6) 	ext{ km/hr} = 66 	ext{ km/hr}.$$

$$= \left(66 	imes  rac{5}{18}ight) 	ext{ m/sec} =  rac{55}{3} 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Time taken to pass the man} = \left( rac{110 	imes 3}{55}ight) 	ext{ sec} = 6 	ext{ sec}.$$

question: $$16.	ext{ A train travelling at a speed of 75 mph enters a tunnel 3} rac{1}{2}	ext{ miles long. The train is } rac{1}{4}	ext{ mile long. How long does it take for the train to pass through the tunnel from the moment the front enters to the moment the rear emerges?}$$ A. $$	ext{2.5 min}$$ B. $$	ext{3 min}$$ C. $$	ext{3.2 min}$$ D. $$	ext{3.5 min}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Total distance covered} = \left(  rac{7 + 1}{2 + 4} ight) 	ext{miles} =  rac{15}{4} 	ext{miles}.$$

$$	ext{Therefore, Time taken} = \left(  rac{15}{4 	imes 75} ight) 	ext{hrs} =  rac{1}{20} 	ext{hrs}.$$

$$	ext{Time taken} = \left(  rac{1}{20} 	imes 60 ight) 	ext{min.} = 3 	ext{min}.$$

question: $$	ext{A train 800 metres long is running at a speed of 78 km/hr. If it crosses a tunnel in 1 minute, then the length of the tunnel (in meters) is:}$$ A. $$	ext{130}$$ B. $$	ext{360}$$ C. $$500$$ D. $$540$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: ```tex
$$
	ext{Speed} = \left( rac{78 	imes 5}{18}ight) 	ext{m/sec} = \left( rac{65}{3}ight) 	ext{m/sec}.
$$

$$
	ext{Time} = 1 	ext{ minute} = 60 	ext{ seconds}.
$$

$$
	ext{Let the length of the tunnel be } x 	ext{ metres}.
$$

$$
	ext{Then, } \left( rac{800 + x}{60}ight) =  rac{65}{3}.
$$

$$
\Rightarrow 3(800 + x) = 3900
$$

$$
\Rightarrow x = 500.
$$
```

question: $$	ext{A 300 metre long train crosses a platform in 39 seconds while it crosses a signal pole in 18 seconds. What is the length of the platform?}$$ A. $$	ext{320 m}$$ B. $$	ext{350 m}$$ C. $$	ext{650 m}$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$
	ext{Speed} =  rac{300}{18} 	imes  rac{5}{3} 	ext{ m/sec} = 50 	ext{ m/sec}.
$$

$$
	ext{Let the length of the platform be } x 	ext{ metres.}
$$

$$
	ext{Then, }  rac{x + 300}{39} = 50
$$

$$
\Rightarrow 3(x + 300) = 1950
$$

$$
\Rightarrow x = 350 	ext{ m.}
$$

question: $$	ext{19. A train speeds past a pole in 15 seconds and a platform 100 m long in 25 seconds. Its length is:}$$ A. $$	ext{50 m}$$ B. $$	ext{150 m}$$ C. $$	ext{200 m}$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the length of the train be } x 	ext{ metres and its speed by } y 	ext{ m/sec.}$$

$$ rac{x}{y} = 15 \Rightarrow y =  rac{x}{15}$$

$$ rac{x + 100}{25} =  rac{x}{15}$$

$$\Rightarrow 15(x + 100) = 25x$$

$$\Rightarrow 15x + 1500 = 25x$$

$$\Rightarrow 1500 = 10x$$

$$\Rightarrow x = 150 	ext{ m.}$$

question: $$	ext{A train moves past a telegraph post and a bridge 264 m long in 8 seconds and 20 seconds respectively. What is the speed of the train?}$$ A. $$	ext{69.5 km/hr}$$ B. $$	ext{70 km/hr}$$ C. $$	ext{79 km/hr}$$ D. $$	ext{79.2 km/hr}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the length of the train be } x 	ext{ metres and its speed by } y 	ext{ m/sec.}$$

$$	ext{Then,}$$
$$x = 8y$$

$$	ext{Now,}$$
$$x + 264 = y$$

$$	ext{Therefore,}$$
$$8y + 264 = 20y$$
$$y = 22$$

$$	ext{Speed = 22 m/sec =}$$
$$\left(22 	imes  rac{18}{5}ight) 	ext{ km/hr = 79.2 km/hr.}$$

question: $$	ext{21. How many seconds will a 500 metre long train take to cross a man walking with a speed of 3 km/hr in the direction of the moving train if the speed of the train is 63 km/hr?}$$ A. $$	ext{25}$$ B. $$	ext{30}$$ C. $$40$$ D. $$45$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Speed of the train relative to man} = (63 - 3) 	ext{ km/hr} = 60 	ext{ km/hr}$$
$$= \left(60 	imes  rac{5}{18}ight) 	ext{ m/sec} =  rac{50}{3} 	ext{ m/sec}$$
$$	ext{Therefore, Time taken to pass the man} = \left(500 	imes  rac{3}{50}ight) 	ext{ sec} = 30 	ext{ sec.}$$

question: $$	ext{22. Two goods train each 500 m long, are running in opposite directions on parallel tracks. Their speeds are 45 km/hr and 30 km/hr respectively. Find the time taken by the slower train to pass the driver of the faster one.}$$ A. $$	ext{12 sec}$$ B. $$	ext{24 sec}$$ C. $$	ext{48 sec}$$ D. $$	ext{60 sec}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Relative speed} = (45 + 30) 	ext{ km/hr} = 75 	imes  rac{5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} =  rac{125}{6} 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Distance covered} = 500 	ext{ m}.$$

$$	ext{Therefore, Required time} =  rac{500 	imes 6}{125} = 24 	ext{ sec}.$$

question: $$	ext{Two trains are running in opposite directions with the same speed. If the length of each train is 120 metres and they cross each other in 12 seconds, then the speed of each train (in km/hr) is:}$$ A. $$10$$ B. $$	ext{18}$$ C. $$	ext{36}$$ D. $$	ext{72}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the speed of each train be } x 	ext{ m/sec.}$$
$$	ext{Then, relative speed of the two trains = } 2x 	ext{ m/sec.}$$

$$	ext{So, } 2x =  rac{240}{12}$$
$$\Rightarrow 2x = 20$$
$$\Rightarrow x = 10$$

$$	ext{Therefore, Speed of each train = } 10 	ext{ m/sec = } \left(10 	imes  rac{18}{5}ight) 	ext{ km/hr = } 36 	ext{ km/hr.}$$

question: $$	ext{24. Two trains of equal lengths take 10 seconds and 15 seconds respectively to cross a telegraph post. If the length of each train be 120 metres, in what time (in seconds) will they cross each other travelling in opposite direction?}$$ A. $$10$$ B. $$12$$ C. $$	ext{15}$$ D. $$	ext{20}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Speed of the first train} =  rac{120}{10} 	ext{ m/sec} = 12 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Speed of the second train} =  rac{120}{15} 	ext{ m/sec} = 8 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Relative speed} = (12 + 8) = 20 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

$$	ext{Therefore, Required time} =  rac{(120 + 120)}{20} 	ext{ sec} = 12 	ext{ sec}.$$

question: $$	ext{25. A train 108 m long moving at a speed of 50 km/hr crosses a train 112 m long coming from opposite direction in 6 seconds. The speed of the second train is:}$$ A. $$	ext{48 km/hr}$$ B. $$	ext{54 km/hr}$$ C. $$	ext{66 km/hr}$$ D. $$	ext{82 km/hr}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the speed of the second train be } x 	ext{ km/hr.}$$

$$	ext{Relative speed} = (x + 50) 	ext{ km/hr}$$

$$	ext{Relative speed} = \left[ (x + 50) 	imes  rac{5}{18} ight] 	ext{ m/sec}$$

$$	ext{Relative speed} = \left[  rac{250 + 5x}{18} ight] 	ext{ m/sec.}$$

$$	ext{Distance covered} = (108 + 112) = 220 	ext{ m.}$$

$$	ext{Therefore, } 220 = 6 \left[  rac{250 + 5x}{18} ight]$$

$$	ext{Hence, } 250 + 5x = 660$$

$$	ext{Therefore, } x = 82 	ext{ km/hr.}$$

question: $$	ext{26. Two trains are running at 40 km/hr and 20 km/hr respectively in the same direction. Fast train completely passes a man sitting in the slower train in 5 seconds. What is the length of the fast train?}$$ A. $$	ext{23 m}$$ B. $$23  rac{2}{9} m$$ C. $$27  rac{7}{9} m$$ D. $$	ext{29 m}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$
	ext{Relative speed} = (40 - 20) 	ext{ km/hr} = 20 	imes  rac{5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} =  rac{50}{9} 	ext{ m/sec}.
$$

$$
	ext{Therefore, Length of faster train} = \left(  rac{50}{9} ight) 	imes 5 	ext{ m} =  rac{250}{9} 	ext{ m} = 27  rac{7}{9} 	ext{ m}.
$$

question: $$	ext{27. A train overtakes two persons who are walking in the same direction in which the train is going, at the rate of 2 kmph and 4 kmph and passes them completely in 9 and 10 seconds respectively. The length of the train is:}$$ A. $$	ext{45 m}$$ B. $$	ext{50 m}$$ C. $$	ext{54 m}$$ D. $$	ext{72 m}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$$$
2 kmph =  rac{2 	imes 5}{18} m/sec =  rac{5}{9} m/sec.
$$$$

$$$$
4 kmph =  rac{4 	imes 5}{18} m/sec =  rac{10}{9} m/sec.
$$$$

$$$$
	ext{Let the length of the train be } x 	ext{ metres and its speed by } y 	ext{ m/sec.}
$$$$

$$$$
	ext{Then,}  rac{x}{y -  rac{5}{9}} = 9 	ext{ and }  rac{x}{y -  rac{10}{9}} = 10.
$$$$

$$$$
	ext{Therefore} 9y - 5 = x 	ext{ and } 10(9y - 10) = 9x
$$$$

$$$$
	ext{Therefore} 9y - x = 5 	ext{ and } 90y - 9x = 100.
$$$$

$$$$
	ext{On solving, we get: } x = 50.
$$$$

$$$$
	ext{Therefore Length of the train is 50 m.}
$$$$

question: $$	ext{28. A train overtakes two persons walking along a railway track. The first one walks at 4.5 km/hr. The other one walks at 5.4 km/hr. The train needs 8.4 and 8.5 seconds respectively to overtake them. What is the speed of the train if both the persons are walking in the same direction as the train?}$$ A. $$	ext{66 km/hr}$$ B. $$	ext{72 km/hr}$$ C. $$	ext{78 km/hr}$$ D. $$	ext{81 km/hr}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$4.5 	ext{ km/hr} =  rac{4.5 	imes 5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} = 1.25 	ext{ m/sec},$$
$$5.4 	ext{ km/hr} =  rac{5.4 	imes 5}{18} 	ext{ m/sec} = 1.5 	ext{ m/sec}.$$

Let the speed of the train be $x$ m/sec.
Then, $(x - 1.25) 	imes 8.4 = (x - 1.5) 	imes 8.5$
$\Rightarrow 8.4x - 10.5 = 8.5x - 12.75$
$\Rightarrow 0.1x = 2.25$
$\Rightarrow x = 22.5$

Therefore, Speed of the train = $ rac{22.5 	imes 18}{5} 	ext{ km/hr} = 81 	ext{ km/hr}$.

question: $$	ext{29. A train travelling at 48 kmph completely crosses another train having half its length and travelling in opposite direction at 42 kmph, in 12 seconds. It also passes a railway platform in 45 seconds. The length of the platform is}$$ A. $$	ext{400 m}$$ B. $$	ext{450 m}$$ C. $$	ext{560 m}$$ D. $$	ext{600 m}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the length of the first train be } x 	ext{ metres.}$$

$$	ext{Then, the length of the second train is } \left( rac{x}{2}ight) 	ext{ metres.}$$

$$	ext{Relative speed = (48 + 42) kmph = } \left( rac{90 	imes 5}{18}ight) 	ext{ m/sec = 25 m/sec.}$$

$$	ext{Therefore, } \left[x + \left( rac{x}{2}ight)ight] \div 25 = 12 	ext{ or }  rac{3x}{2} = 300 	ext{ or } x = 200.$$

$$	ext{Length of first train = 200 m.}$$

$$	ext{Let the length of platform be } y 	ext{ metres.}$$

$$	ext{Speed of the first train = } \left( rac{48 	imes 5}{18}ight) 	ext{ m/sec = }  rac{40}{3} 	ext{ m/sec.}$$

$$	ext{Therefore, } (200 + y) 	imes  rac{3}{40} = 45.$$

$$	ext{Hence, } 600 + 3y = 1800 	ext{ and } y = 400 	ext{ m.}$$

question: $$	ext{30. Two stations A and B are 110 km apart on a straight line. One train starts from A at 7 a.m. and travels towards B at 20 kmph. Another train starts from B at 8 a.m. and travels towards A at a speed of 25 kmph. At what time will they meet?}$$ A. $$	ext{9 a.m.}$$ B. $$	ext{10 a.m.}$$ C. $$	ext{10.30 a.m.}$$ D. $$	ext{11 a.m.}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Suppose they meet } x 	ext{ hours after 7 a.m.}$$
$$	ext{Distance covered by A in } x 	ext{ hours} = 20x 	ext{ km.}$$
$$	ext{Distance covered by B in }(x - 1) 	ext{ hours} = 25(x - 1) 	ext{ km.}$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 20x + 25(x - 1) = 110$$
$$	ext{Hence, } 45x = 135$$
$$	ext{Thus, } x = 3.$$
$$	ext{So, they meet at 10 a.m.}$$

question: $$	ext{31. Two trains, one from Howrah to Patna and the other from Patna to Howrah, start simultaneously. After they meet, the trains reach their destinations after 9 hours and 16 hours respectively. The ratio of their speeds is:}$$ A. $$ rac{2}{3}$$ B. $$ rac{4}{3}$$ C. $$ rac{6}{7}$$ D. $$ rac{9}{16}$$
answer: 答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{(A's speed) : (B's speed) = 16 : 9 = 4 : 3}.$$

question: $$	ext{A person crosses a 600 m long street in 5 minutes. What is his speed in km per hour?}$$ A. $$3.6$$ B. $$7.2$$ C. $$8.4$$ D. $$10$$
answer:

$$	ext{Converting m/sec to km/hr:} =  rac{2 	imes 18}{5} 	ext{ km/hr} = 7.2 	ext{ km/hr}.$$

question: $$	ext{The ratio between the speeds of two trains is 7 : 8. If the second train runs 400 km in 4 hours, then the speed of the first train is:}$$ A. $$	ext{70 km/hr}$$ B. $$	ext{75 km/hr}$$ C. $$	ext{84 km/hr}$$ D. $$	ext{87.5 km/hr}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$Let\ the\ speed\ of\ two\ trains\ be\ 7x\ and\ 8x\ km/hr.$$

$$Then,\ 8x\ =\  rac{400}{4}\ =\ 100$$

$$x\ =\  rac{100}{8}\ =\ 12.5$$

$$Speed\ of\ first\ train\ =\ (7\ x\ 12.5)\ km/hr\ =\ 87.5\ km/hr.$$

question: $$10.	ext{ A car travelling with }  rac{5}{7} 	ext{ of its actual speed covers 42 km in 1 hr 40 min 48 sec. Find the actual speed of the car.}$$ A. $$ rac{17}{7} 	ext{ km/hr}$$ B. $$	ext{25 km/hr}$$ C. $$	ext{30 km/hr}$$ D. $$	ext{35 km/hr}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Time taken} = 1 	ext{ hr } 40 	ext{ min } 48 	ext{ sec} = 1 	ext{ hr } 40 	ext{ min} = 1  rac{51}{75} 	ext{ hrs} =  rac{126}{75} 	ext{ hrs}.$$

Let the actual speed be $x$ km/hr.

Then, 
$$ rac{5}{7} x \cdot  rac{126}{75} = 42.$$

Therefore, 
$$x =  rac{42 \cdot 7 \cdot 75}{5 \cdot 126} = 35 	ext{ km/hr}.$$

question: $$	ext{11. In covering a distance of 30 km, Abhay takes 2 hours more than Sameer. If Abhay doubles his speed, then he would take 1 hour less than Sameer. Abhay's speed is:}$$ A. $$	ext{5 kmph}$$ B. $$	ext{6 kmph}$$ C. $$	ext{6.25 kmph}$$ D. $$	ext{7.5 kmph}$$

$$	ext{12. Robert is travelling on his cycle and has calculated to reach point A at 2 P.M. if he travels at 10 kmph, he will reach there at 12 noon if he travels at 15 kmph. At what speed must he travel to reach A at 1 P.M.?}$$ A. $$	ext{8 kmph}$$ B. $$	ext{11 kmph}$$ C. $$	ext{12 kmph}$$ D. $$	ext{14 kmph}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the distance travelled by } x 	ext{ km}.$$

$$	ext{Then, }  rac{x}{10} -  rac{x}{15} = 2$$

$$\Rightarrow 3x - 2x = 60$$

$$\Rightarrow x = 60 	ext{ km}.$$

$$	ext{Time taken to travel 60 km at 10 km/hr = }  rac{60}{10} 	ext{ hrs} = 6 	ext{ hrs}.$$

$$	ext{Required speed = }  rac{60}{5} 	ext{ kmph.} = 12 	ext{ kmph.}$$

question: $$	ext{13. It takes eight hours for a 600 km journey, if 120 km is done by train and the rest by car. It takes 20 minutes more, if 200 km is done by train and the rest by car. The ratio of the speed of the train to that of the cars is:}$$ A. $$2 : 3$$ B. $$3 : 2$$ C. $$ rac{3}{4}$$ D. $$ rac{4}{3}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$Let\ the\ speed\ of\ the\ train\ be\ x\ km/hr\ and\ that\ of\ the\ car\ be\ y\ km/hr.$$

$$Then,$$
$$120 + 480 = 8 \implies  rac{1}{x} +  rac{4}{y} =  rac{1}{15} \quad ....(i)$$

$$And,$$
$$200 + 400 = 25 \implies  rac{1}{x} +  rac{2}{y} =  rac{1}{24} \quad ....(ii)$$

$$Solving\ (i)\ and\ (ii),\ we\ get:\ x = 60\ and\ y = 80.$$

$$Ratio\ of\ speeds = 60 : 80 = 3 : 4.$$

question: $$	ext{14. A farmer travelled a distance of 61 km in 9 hours. He travelled partly on foot @ 4 km/hr and partly on bicycle @ 9 km/hr. The distance travelled on foot is:}$$ A. $$	ext{14 km}$$ B. $$	ext{15 km}$$ C. $$	ext{16 km}$$ D. $$	ext{17 km}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the distance travelled on foot be } x 	ext{ km.}$$
$$	ext{Then, distance travelled on bicycle = (61 - } x 	ext{) km.}$$
$$	ext{So, }  rac{x}{4} +  rac{61 - x}{9} = 9$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 9x + 4(61 - x) = 9 	imes 36$$
$$	ext{Hence, } 5x = 80$$
$$	ext{Thus, } x = 16 	ext{ km.}$$

question: $$	ext{15. A man covered a certain distance at some speed. Had he moved 3 kmph faster, he would have taken 40 minutes less. If he had moved 2 kmph slower, he would have taken 40 minutes more. The distance (in km) is:}$$ A. $$	ext{35}$$ B. $$ rac{36}{2 	imes 3}$$ C. $$ rac{37}{2}$$ D. $$	ext{40}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let distance = }x 	ext{ km and usual rate = }y 	ext{ kmph}.$$

$$	ext{Then,}$$
$$ rac{x}{y} -  rac{x}{y + 3} = 40 \implies 2y(y + 3) = 9x 	ext{ ....(i)}$$

$$	ext{And,}$$
$$ rac{x}{y - 2} -  rac{x}{y} = 40 \implies y(y - 2) = 3x 	ext{ ....(ii)}$$

$$	ext{On dividing (i) by (ii), we get: }x = 40.$$

question: $$	ext{An observer 1.6 m tall is 203 m away from a tower. The angle of elevation from his eye to the top of the tower is 30°. The height of the tower is:}$$ A. $$	ext{21.6 m}$$ B. $$	ext{23.2 m}$$ C. $$	ext{24.72 m}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$

$$	ext{CD = CE + DE = (1.6 + 20) m = 21.6 m.}$$

$$	ext{AP} = 173 	ext{ m.}$$

question: $$	ext{A can do a work in 15 days and B in 20 days. If they work on it together for 4 days, then the fraction of the work that is left is :}$$ A. $$1 \div 4$$ B. $$1 \div 10$$ C. $$7 \div 15$$ D. $$8 \div 15$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{A's 1 day's work} =  rac{1}{15};$$
$$	ext{B's 1 day's work} =  rac{1}{20};$$
$$(	ext{A + B})'	ext{s 1 day's work} = \left( rac{1}{15} +  rac{1}{20}ight) =  rac{7}{60};$$
$$(	ext{A + B})'	ext{s 4 day's work} = \left( rac{7}{60} 	imes 4ight) =  rac{7}{15};$$
$$	ext{Therefore, Remaining work} = \left(1 -  rac{7}{15}ight) =  rac{8}{15}.$$

question: $$	ext{A can lay railway track between two given stations in 16 days and B can do the same job in 12 days. With help of C, they did the job in 4 days only. Then, C alone can do the job in:}$$ A. $$9  rac{1}{5} 	ext{ days}$$ B. $$9  rac{2}{5} 	ext{ days}$$ C. $$ rac{9}{5} 	ext{ days}$$ D. $$10$$

$$	ext{So, C alone can do the work in }  rac{48}{5} = 9 rac{3}{5} 	ext{ days.}$$

$$Work 	ext{ done in 3 days} = \left( rac{1}{10} +  rac{1}{10}ight) =  rac{1}{5}.$$

question: $$	ext{4. A is thrice as good as workman as B and therefore is able to finish a job in 60 days less than B. Working together, they can do it in:}$$ A. $$	ext{20 days}$$ B. $$ rac{22}{2} 	ext{ days}$$ C. $$	ext{25 days}$$ D. $$	ext{30 days}$$
answer:

$$	ext{The time difference is (3 - 1) 2 days while B take 3 days and A takes 1 day}.$$

$$	ext{If difference of time is 2 days, B takes 3 days}.$$

$$	ext{If difference of time is 60 days, B takes} \left(  rac{3}{2} ight) 	imes 60 = 90 	ext{ days}.$$

$$	ext{So, A takes 30 days to do the work}.$$

$$	ext{B's 1 day's work =}  rac{1}{90}.$$

$$(A + B)'s 1 day's work = \left(  rac{1}{30} +  rac{1}{90} ight) =  rac{4}{90} =  rac{2}{45}.$$

$$	ext{A and B together can do the work in}  rac{45}{2} = 22 rac{1}{2} 	ext{ days}.$$

question: $$	ext{A alone can do a piece of work in 6 days and B alone in 8 days. A and B undertook to do it for Rs. 3200. With the help of C, they completed the work in 3 days. How much is to be paid to C?}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 375}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 400}$$ C. $$	ext{Rs. 600}$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 800}$$

$$	ext{C's share (for 3 days) = Rs. } \left(3 	imes  rac{1}{24} 	imes 3200ight) = 	ext{Rs. 400}.$$

question: $$	ext{If 6 men and 8 boys can do a piece of work in 10 days while 26 men and 48 boys can do the same in 2 days, the time taken by 15 men and 20 boys in doing the same type of work will be:}$$ A. $$	ext{4 days}$$ B. $$	ext{5 days}$$ C. $$	ext{6 days}$$ D. $$	ext{7 days}$$

$$	ext{Then, } 6x + 8y =  rac{1}{10} 	ext{ and } 26x + 48y =  rac{1}{2}.$$

$$	ext{Solving these two equations, we get : } x =  rac{1}{100} 	ext{ and } y =  rac{1}{200}.$$

$$	ext{(15 men + 20 boy)'s 1 day's work} = \left(  rac{15}{100} +  rac{20}{200} ight) =  rac{1}{4}.$$

$$	ext{Therefore, 15 men and 20 boys can do the work in 4 days.}$$

question: $$	ext{A can do a piece of work in 4 hours; B and C together can do it in 3 hours, while A and C together can do it in 2 hours. How long will B alone take to do it?}$$ A. $$	ext{8 hours}$$ B. $$	ext{10 hours}$$ C. $$	ext{12 hours}$$ D. $$	ext{24 hours}$$

$$	ext{Therefore, B alone will take 12 hours to do the work}.$$

question: $$	ext{8. A can do a certain work in the same time in which B and C together can do it. If A and B together could do it in 10 days and C alone in 50 days, then B alone could do it in:}$$ A. $$	ext{15 days}$$ B. $$	ext{20 days}$$ C. $$	ext{25 days}$$ D. $$	ext{30 days}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$
	ext{(A + B)'s 1 day's work = }  rac{1}{10} \
	ext{C's 1 day's work = }  rac{1}{50} \
	ext{(A + B + C)'s 1 day's work = } \left( rac{1}{10} +  rac{1}{50}ight) =  rac{6}{50} =  rac{3}{25} 	ext{ .... (i)} \
	ext{A's 1 day's work = (B + C)'s 1 day's work .... (ii)} \
	ext{From (i) and (ii), we get: 2 x (A's 1 day's work) = }  rac{3}{25} \
\Rightarrow 	ext{A's 1 day's work = }  rac{3}{50} \
\Rightarrow 	ext{B's 1 day's work = } \left( rac{1}{10} -  rac{3}{50}ight) =  rac{2}{50} =  rac{1}{25} \
	ext{So, B alone could do the work in 25 days.}
$$

question: $$	ext{9. A does 80% of a work in 20 days. He then calls in B and they together finish the remaining work in 3 days. How long B alone would take to do the whole work?}$$ A. $$	ext{23 days}$$ B. $$	ext{37 days}$$ C. $$ rac{37}{2}$$ D. $$	ext{40 days}$$

$$

$$

$$

$$

$$

$$

$$
	ext{Therefore B's 1 day's work =} \left(  rac{1}{15} -  rac{1}{25} ight) =  rac{4}{150} =  rac{2}{75}.
$$

$$
	ext{So, B alone would do the work in}  rac{75}{2} = 37 rac{1}{2} 	ext{days.}
$$

$$\left( rac{37}{120} 	imes 2ight) =  rac{37}{60}$$

$$1 -  rac{37}{60} =  rac{23}{60}$$

$$	ext{So, the work will be finished approximately 2 hours after 11 A.M., i.e., around 1 P.M.}$$

question: $$	ext{A sum of money amounts to Rs. 9800 after 5 years and Rs. 12005 after 8 years at the same rate of simple interest. The rate of interest per annum is:}$$ A. $$	ext{5\%}$$ B. $$	ext{8\%}$$ C. $$	ext{12\%}$$ D. $$	ext{15\%}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$S.I. 	ext{ for 3 years} = Rs. (12005 - 9800) = Rs. 2205.$$

$$S.I. 	ext{ for 5 years} = Rs. \left( rac{2205}{3} 	imes 5ight) = Rs. 3675.$$

$$	ext{Principal} = Rs. (9800 - 3675) = Rs. 6125.$$

$$	ext{Hence, rate} = \left( rac{100 	imes 3675}{6125 	imes 5}ight)\% = 12\%.$$

question: $$	ext{What will be the ratio of simple interest earned by certain amount at the same rate of interest for 6 years and that for 9 years?}$$ A. $$	ext{1 : 3}$$ B. $$	ext{1 : 4}$$ C. $$2 : 3$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$
	ext{Required ratio} =  rac{P 	imes R 	imes 6}{100} :  rac{P 	imes R 	imes 9}{100} = 6PR : 9PR = 6 : 9 = 2 : 3.
$$

question: $$	ext{14. A person borrows Rs. 5000 for 2 years at 4% p.a. simple interest. He immediately lends it to another person at 6 rac{1}{4}% p.a for 2 years. Find his gain in the transaction per year.}$$ A. $$Rs. 112.50$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 125}$$ C. $$	ext{Rs. 225}$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 167.50}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: ```tex
$$
	ext{Gain in 2 years} = 	ext{Rs.} \left[ 5000 	imes  rac{25}{100} 	imes 2 -  rac{5000 	imes 4 	imes 2}{100} ight] = 	ext{Rs.} (625 - 400) = 	ext{Rs.} 225.
$$

$$
	ext{Gain in 1 year} = 	ext{Rs.} \left(  rac{225}{2} ight) = 	ext{Rs.} 112.50
$$
```

question: $$	ext{A bank offers 5% compound interest calculated on half-yearly basis. A customer deposits Rs. 1600 each on 1<sup>st</sup> January and 1<sup>st</sup> July of a year. At the end of the year, the amount he would have gained by way of interest is:}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 120}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 121}$$ C. $$	ext{Rs. 122}$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 123}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: ```tex
$$
	ext{Amount} = 	ext{Rs.}~\left[1600 	imes \left(1 +  rac{5}{2 	imes 100}ight)^2 + 1600 	imes \left(1 +  rac{5}{2 	imes 100}ight)^2ight]
$$
$$
= 	ext{Rs.}~\left[1600 	imes  rac{41}{40} 	imes  rac{41}{40} + 1600 	imes  rac{41}{40} 	imes  rac{41}{40}ight]
$$
$$
= 	ext{Rs.}~\left[1600 	imes  rac{41}{40} 	imes \left( rac{41}{40} + 1ight)ight]
$$
$$
= 	ext{Rs.}~\left[1600 	imes  rac{41 	imes 81}{40 	imes 40}ight]
$$
$$
= 	ext{Rs.}~ oxed{3321}
$$
$$
	ext{C.I.} = 	ext{Rs.}~\left(3321 - 3200ight) = 	ext{Rs.}~ oxed{121}
$$
```

question: $$	ext{The difference between simple and compound interests compounded annually on a certain sum of money for 2 years at 4% per annum is Re. 1. The sum (in Rs.) is:}$$ A. $$625$$ B. $$	ext{630}$$ C. $$	ext{640}$$ D. $$650$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the sum be Rs. } x.$$

$$
	ext{C.I. } = \left[ x \left( 1 +  rac{4}{100} ight)^2 - x ight] =  rac{676x - x}{625} =  rac{51x}{625}.$$

$$
	ext{S.I. } =  rac{x 	imes 4 	imes 2}{100} =  rac{2x}{25}.$$

$$
 rac{51x}{625} -  rac{2x}{25} = 1 \quad \Rightarrow \quad x = 625.
$$

$$	ext{What is the difference between the compound interests on Rs. 5000 for 1} rac{1}{2}	ext{ years at 4% per annum compounded yearly and half-yearly?}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 2.04}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 3.06}$$ C. $$Rs. 4.80$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 8.30}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{C.I. when interest compounded yearly} = 	ext{Rs.} \left[ 5000 	imes \left( 1 +  rac{4}{100} ight) 	imes \left( 1 +  rac{1}{2} 	imes  rac{4}{100} ight) ight]$$

$$	ext{C.I. when interest compounded yearly} = 	ext{Rs.} \left[ 5000 	imes  rac{26}{25} 	imes  rac{51}{50} ight]$$

$$	ext{C.I. when interest compounded yearly} = 	ext{Rs.} 5304$$

$$	ext{C.I. when interest is compounded half-yearly} = 	ext{Rs.} \left[ 5000 	imes \left( 1 +  rac{2}{100} ight)^3 ight]$$

$$	ext{C.I. when interest is compounded half-yearly} = 	ext{Rs.} \left[ 5000 	imes  rac{51}{50} 	imes  rac{51}{50} 	imes  rac{51}{50} ight]$$

$$	ext{C.I. when interest is compounded half-yearly} = 	ext{Rs.} 5306.04$$

$$	ext{Difference} = 	ext{Rs.} (5306.04 - 5304) = 	ext{Rs.} 2.04$$

question: $$	ext{The compound interest on Rs. 30,000 at 7% per annum is Rs. 4347. The period (in years) is:}$$ A. $$	ext{2}$$ B. $$ rac{2}{1 \div 2}$$ C. $$3$$ D. $$4$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Amount} = 	ext{Rs.} (30000 + 4347) = 	ext{Rs.} 34347.$$
$$	ext{Let the time be } n 	ext{ years}.$$

$$30000 \left(1 +  rac{7}{100}ight)^n = 34347$$

$$\Rightarrow \left(1 +  rac{7}{100}ight)^n =  rac{34347}{30000}$$
$$\Rightarrow \left( rac{107}{100}ight)^n =  rac{11449}{10000}$$
$$\Rightarrow \left( rac{107}{100}ight)^n = \left( rac{107}{100}ight)^2$$
$$\Rightarrow n = 2 	ext{ years}.$$

$$	ext{The least number of complete years in which a sum of money put out at 20% compound interest will be more than doubled is:}$$ A. $$3$$ B. $$	ext{4}$$ C. $$5$$ D. $$6$$

question: $$	ext{Alfred buys an old scooter for Rs. 4700 and spends Rs. 800 on its repairs. If he sells the scooter for Rs. 5800, his gain percent is:}$$ A. $$ rac{4}{7} 	ext{\%}$$ B. $$5 \div 11 = 5\%$$ C. $$	ext{10\%}$$ D. $$	ext{12\%}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Cost Price (C.P.)} = 	ext{Rs. } (4700 + 800) = 	ext{Rs. } 5500.$$
$$	ext{Selling Price (S.P.)} = 	ext{Rs. } 5800.$$
$$	ext{Gain} = (	ext{S.P.}) - (	ext{C.P.}) = 	ext{Rs. } (5800 - 5500) = 	ext{Rs. } 300.$$
$$	ext{Gain %} = \left( rac{300}{5500} 	imes 100ight) \% = 5 \%.$$

question: $$	ext{The cost price of 20 articles is the same as the selling price of } x 	ext{ articles. If the profit is 25%, then the value of } x 	ext{ is:}$$ A. $$15$$ B. $$	ext{16}$$ C. $$	ext{18}$$ D. $$	ext{25}$$

$$	ext{S.P. of }x	ext{ articles = Rs. 20}.$$
$$	ext{Profit = Rs. (20 - }x	ext{)}.$$
$$ rac{20 - x}{x} 	imes 100 = 25$$
$$2000 - 100x = 25x$$
$$125x = 2000$$
$$x = 16.$$

question: $$	ext{If selling price is doubled, the profit triples. Find the profit percent.}$$ A. $$ rac{66}{2 	imes 3}$$ B. $$	ext{100}$$ C. $$ rac{105}{3}$$ D. $$120$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let C.P. be Rs. }x	ext{ and S.P. be Rs. }y.$$

$$	ext{Profit = Rs. }(y - x) = Rs. (2x - x) = Rs. x.$$
$$	ext{Profit % =} \left( rac{x}{x}ight) 	imes 100\% = 100\%$$

question: $$	ext{In a certain store, the profit is 320\% of the cost. If the cost increases by 25\% but the selling price remains constant, approximately what percentage of the selling price is the profit?}$$ A. $$	ext{30\%}$$ B. $$	ext{70\%}$$ C. $$	ext{100\%}$$ D. $$	ext{250\%}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let C.P.}= 	ext{Rs.}~\mathbf{100}. 	ext{Then, Profit} = 	ext{Rs.}~\mathbf{320}, 	ext{S.P.} = 	ext{Rs.}~\mathbf{420}.$$
$$	ext{New C.P.} = 125\% 	ext{ of Rs.}~\mathbf{100} = 	ext{Rs.}~\mathbf{125}$$
$$	ext{New S.P.} = 	ext{Rs.}~\mathbf{420}.$$
$$	ext{Profit} = 	ext{Rs.}~\mathbf{(420 - 125)} = 	ext{Rs.}~\mathbf{295}.$$
$$	ext{Required percentage} =  rac{295 	imes 100}{420} pprox 70\%.$$

$$	ext{So, their marks are 42 and 33}.$$

question: $$	ext{14. Rajeev buys good worth Rs. 6650. He gets a rebate of 6% on it. After getting the rebate, he pays sales tax @ 10%. Find the amount he will have to pay for the goods.}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 6876.10}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 6999.20}$$ C. $$Rs. 6654$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 7000}$$

$$

question: $$	ext{1. Father is aged three times more than his son Ronit. After 8 years, he would be two and a half times of Ronit's age. After further 8 years, how many times would he be of Ronit's age?}$$ A. $$	ext{2 times}$$ B. $$	ext{2 times 1 divided by 2}$$ C. $$	ext{2 times 3 divided by 4}$$ D. $$	ext{3 times}$$

$$

$$

$$

$$
	ext{From the table: }  rac{(4x + 8)}{2} = (x + 8) \Rightarrow 8x + 16 = 5x + 40 \Rightarrow 3x = 24 \Rightarrow x = 8.
$$

question: $$	ext{The sum of ages of 5 children born at the intervals of 3 years each is 50 years. What is the age of the youngest child?}$$ A. $$	ext{4 years}$$ B. $$	ext{8 years}$$ C. $$	ext{10 years}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$

$$\implies x = 4$$
$$	ext{Age of the youngest child } = x = 4 	ext{ years.}$$

question: $$	ext{A father said to his son, "I was as old as you are at the present at the time of your birth". If the father's age is 38 years now, the son's age five years back was:}$$ A. $$	ext{14 years}$$ B. $$	ext{19 years}$$ C. $$	ext{33 years}$$ D. $$	ext{38 years}$$

question: $$	ext{Present ages of Sameer and Anand are in the ratio of 5 : 4 respectively. Three years hence, the ratio of their ages will become 11 : 9 respectively. What is Anand's present age in years?}$$ A. $$	ext{24}$$ B. $$	ext{27}$$ C. $$40$$ D. $$	ext{Cannot be determined}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: ```tex
$$	ext{Let the present ages of Sameer and Anand be } 5x 	ext{ years and } 4x 	ext{ years respectively}.$$

$$	ext{Then,}$$
$$5x + 3 = 11$$
$$4x + 3 = 9$$

$$\Rightarrow 9(5x + 3) = 11(4x + 3)$$
$$\Rightarrow 45x + 27 = 44x + 33$$
$$\Rightarrow 45x - 44x = 33 - 27$$

$$\Rightarrow x = 6.$$
$$\Rightarrow 	ext{Anand's present age } = 4x = 24 	ext{ years}.$$
```

question: $$	ext{6. A man is 24 years older than his son. In two years, his age will be twice the age of his son. The present age of his son is:}$$ A. $$	ext{14 years}$$ B. $$	ext{18 years}$$ C. $$	ext{20 years}$$ D. $$	ext{22 years}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$Let \ the \ son's \ present \ age \ be \ x \ years. \ Then, \ man's \ present \ age = (x + 24) \ years.$$
$$(x + 24) + 2 = 2(x + 2)$$
$$x + 26 = 2x + 4$$
$$x = 22.$$

question: $$	ext{Six years ago, the ratio of the ages of Kunal and Sagar was 6 : 5. Four years hence, the ratio of their ages will be 11 : 10. $$5x = 10$$

$$	ext{Sagar's present age = (5}x + 6) = 16 	ext{ years.}$$

question: $$	ext{8. The sum of the present ages of a father and his son is 60 years. Six years ago, father's age was five times the age of the son. After 6 years, son's age will be:}$$ A. $$	ext{12 years}$$ B. $$	ext{14 years}$$ C. $$	ext{18 years}$$ D. $$	ext{20 years}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$Let\ the\ present\ ages\ of\ son\ and\ father\ be\ x\ and\ (60 -x)\ years\ respectively.$$
$$Then,\ (60 - x) - 6 = 5(x - 6)$$
$$54 - x = 5x - 30$$
$$6x = 84$$
$$x = 14$$
$$Son's\ age\ after\ 6\ years\ = (x + 6) = 20\ years.$$

question: $$	ext{10. Sachin is younger than Rahul by 7 years. If their ages are in the respective ratio of 7 : 9, how old is Sachin?}$$ A. $$	ext{16 years}$$ B. $$	ext{18 years}$$ C. $$	ext{28 years}$$ D. $$	ext{24.5 years}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$ 	ext{Let Rahul's age be } x 	ext{ years.} $$
$$ 	ext{Then, Sachin's age = }(x - 7) 	ext{ years.} $$
$$  rac{x - 7}{x} =  rac{7}{9} $$
$$ 9x - 63 = 7x $$
$$ 2x = 63 $$
$$ x = 31.5 $$
$$ 	ext{Hence, Sachin's age =}(x - 7) = 24.5 	ext{ years.} $$

question: $$	ext{11. The present ages of three persons in proportions 4 : 7 : 9. Eight years ago, the sum of their ages was 56. Find their present ages (in years).}$$ A. $$	ext{8, 20, 28}$$ B. $$	ext{16, 28, 36}$$ C. $$	ext{20, 35, 45}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let their present ages be } 4x, 7x 	ext{ and } 9x 	ext{ years respectively.}$$
$$	ext{Then, } (4x - 8) + (7x - 8) + (9x - 8) = 56$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 20x = 80$$
$$	ext{Thus, } x = 4.$$
$$	ext{Their present ages are } 4x = 16 	ext{ years, } 7x = 28 	ext{ years and } 9x = 36 	ext{ years respectively.}$$

question: $$	ext{13. A person's present age is two-fifth of the age of his mother. After 8 years, he will be one-half of the age of his mother. How old is the mother at present?}$$ A. $$	ext{32 years}$$ B. $$	ext{36 years}$$ C. $$	ext{40 years}$$ D. $$	ext{48 years}$$

question: $$	ext{14. Q is as much younger than R as he is older than T. If the sum of the ages of R and T is 50 years, what is definitely the difference between R and Q's age?}$$ A. $$	ext{1 year}$$ B. $$	ext{2 years}$$ C. $$	ext{25 years}$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$
	ext{Given that:}\
	ext{1. The difference of age b/w R and Q = The difference of age b/w Q and T.}\
	ext{2. Sum of age of R and T is 50 i.e. (R + T) = 50.}\
\
	ext{Question: R - Q = ?.}\
\
	ext{Explanation:}\
\
R - Q = Q - T\
\
(R + T) = 2Q\
\
	ext{Now given that, (R + T) = 50}\
\
	ext{So, 50 = 2Q and therefore Q = 25.}\
\
	ext{Question is (R - Q) = ?}\
\
	ext{Here we know the value(age) of Q (25), but we don't know the age of R.}\
\
	ext{Therefore, (R-Q) cannot be determined.}
$$

答案是:D 解析如下: $$At\ 3\ o'clock,\ the\ minute\ hand\ is\ 15\ min.\ spaces\ apart\ from\ the\ hour\ hand.$$
$$To\ be\ coincident,\ it\ must\ gain\ 15\ min.\ spaces.$$
$$55\ min.\ are\ gained\ in\ 60\ min.$$
$$15\ min.\ are\ gained\ in\ \left( rac{60}{55} 	imes 15ight)\ min = 16 rac{4}{11}\ min.$$
$$The\ hands\ are\ coincident\ at\ 16 rac{4}{11}\ min.\ past\ 3.$$

$$

question: $$	ext{In the first 10 overs of a cricket game, the run rate was only 3.2. What should be the run rate in the remaining 40 overs to reach the target of 282 runs?}$$ A. $$6.25$$ B. $$6.5$$ C. $$	ext{6.75}$$ D. $$	ext{7}$$
answer: 答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Required run rate} =  rac{282 - (3.2 	imes 10)}{40} =  rac{250}{40} = 6.25$$

question: $$	ext{A grocer has a sale of Rs. 6435, Rs. 6927, Rs. 6855, Rs. 7230, and Rs. 6562 for 5 consecutive months. How much sale must he have in the sixth month so that he gets an average sale of Rs. 6500?}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 4991}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 5991}$$ C. $$	ext{Rs. 6001}$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 6991}$$

$$	ext{Required sale} = 	ext{Rs.}~\left[\left(6500 	imes 6ight) - 34009ight]$$

question: $$	ext{6. The captain of a cricket team of 11 members is 26 years old and the wicket keeper is 3 years older. If the ages of these two are excluded, the average age of the remaining players is one year less than the average age of the whole team. What is the average age of the team?}$$ A. $$	ext{23 years}$$ B. $$	ext{24 years}$$ C. $$	ext{25 years}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the average age of the whole team by } x 	ext{ years.}$$
$$11x - (26 + 29) = 9(x -1)$$
$$11x - 9x = 46$$
$$2x = 46$$
$$x = 23$$
$$	ext{So, average age of the team is 23 years.}$$

question: $$	ext{7. The average monthly income of P and Q is Rs. 5050. The average monthly income of Q and R is Rs. 6250 and the average monthly income of P and R is Rs. 5200. The monthly income of P is:}$$ A. $$3500$$ B. $$4000$$ C. $$	ext{4050}$$ D. $$5000$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let P, Q and R represent their respective monthly incomes. Then, we have:}$$
$$	ext{P + Q = (5050 x 2) = 10100 .... (i)}$$
$$	ext{Q + R = (6250 x 2) = 12500 .... (ii)}$$
$$	ext{P + R = (5200 x 2) = 10400 .... (iii)}$$
$$	ext{Adding (i), (ii) and (iii), we get: 2(P + Q + R) = 33000 or P + Q + R = 16500 .... (iv)}$$
$$	ext{Subtracting (ii) from (iv), we get P = 4000.}$$
$$	ext{P's monthly income = Rs. 4000.}$$

question: $$	ext{The average age of husband, wife and their child 3 years ago was 27 years and that of wife and the child 5 years ago was 20 years. The present age of the husband is:}$$ A. $$	ext{35 years}$$ B. $$	ext{40 years}$$ C. $$	ext{50 years}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Sum of the present ages of husband, wife and child} = (27 	imes 3 + 3 	imes 3) 	ext{ years} = 90 	ext{ years}.$$
$$	ext{Sum of the present ages of wife and child} = (20 	imes 2 + 5 	imes 2) 	ext{ years} = 50 	ext{ years}.$$
$$	ext{Husband's present age} = (90 - 50) 	ext{ years} = 40 	ext{ years}.$$

question: $$	ext{A car owner buys petrol at Rs.7.50, Rs. 8 and Rs. 8.50 per litre for three successive years. What approximately is the average cost per litre of petrol if he spends Rs. 4000 each year?}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 7.98}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 8}$$ C. $$Rs. 8.50$$ D. $$Rs. 9$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Total quantity of petrol consumed in 3 years} = 4000 \left(  rac{2}{7.50} +  rac{1}{8} +  rac{2}{8.50} ight) 	ext{ litres}$$

$$	ext{Total quantity of petrol consumed in 3 years} = 4000 \left(  rac{2}{15} +  rac{1}{8} +  rac{2}{17} ight) 	ext{ litres}$$

$$	ext{Total quantity of petrol consumed in 3 years} =  rac{76700}{51} 	ext{ litres}$$

$$	ext{Total amount spent} = 	ext{Rs.}~\left( 3 	imes 4000 ight) = 	ext{Rs.}~\left( 12000 ight)$$

$$	ext{Average cost} = 	ext{Rs.}~ rac{12000 	imes 51}{76700} = 	ext{Rs.}~ rac{6120}{767} = 	ext{Rs.}~\left( 7.98 ight)$$

question: $$	ext{In Arun's opinion, his weight is greater than 65 kg but less than 72 kg. His brother thinks that Arun's weight is greater than 60 kg but less than 70 kg. His mother believes that his weight cannot be greater than 68 kg. If all of them are correct in their estimation, what is the average of different probable weights of Arun?}$$ A. $$	ext{67 kg}$$ B. $$	ext{68 kg}$$ C. $$	ext{69 kg}$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let Arun's weight be X kg.}$$
$$	ext{According to Arun, } 65 < X < 72$$
$$	ext{According to Arun's brother, } 60 < X < 70$$
$$	ext{According to Arun's mother, } X \leq 68$$
$$	ext{The values satisfying all the above conditions are 66, 67, and 68.}$$
$$	ext{Required average = }  rac{66 + 67 + 68}{3} =  rac{201}{3} = 67 	ext{ kg.}$$

question: $$	ext{11. The average weight of A, B and C is 45 kg. If the average weight of A and B be 40 kg and that of B and C be 43 kg, then the weight of B is:}$$ A. $$	ext{17 kg}$$ B. $$	ext{20 kg}$$ C. $$	ext{26 kg}$$ D. $$	ext{31 kg}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let A, B, C represent their respective weights. Then, we have:}$$
$$	ext{A + B + C = (45 x 3) = 135 .... (i)}$$
$$	ext{A + B = (40 x 2) = 80 .... (ii)}$$
$$	ext{B + C = (43 x 2) = 86 ....(iii)}$$
$$	ext{Adding (ii) and (iii), we get: A + 2B + C = 166 .... (iv)}$$
$$	ext{Subtracting (i) from (iv), we get : B = 31.}$$
$$	ext{B's weight = 31 kg.}$$

question: $$	ext{The ratio between the perimeter and the breadth of a rectangle is 5 : 1. If the area of the rectangle is 216 sq. cm, what is the length of the rectangle?}$$ A. $$	ext{16 cm}$$ B. $$	ext{18 cm}$$ C. $$	ext{24 cm}$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$ egin{aligned}

3b &= 2l \
b &=  rac{2}{3}l \
	ext{Area} &= 216 	ext{ cm}^2 \
lb &= 216 \

question: $$	ext{The percentage increase in the area of a rectangle, if each of its sides is increased by 20% is:}$$ A. $$	ext{40\%}$$ B. $$	ext{42\%}$$ C. $$	ext{44\%}$$ D. $$	ext{46\%}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let original length = }x	ext{ metres and original breadth = }y	ext{ metres}.$$
$$	ext{Original area = }(xy)	ext{ m}^2.$$

$$	ext{New length = }\left( rac{6}{5}ight)x	ext{ m}.$$
$$	ext{New breadth = }\left( rac{6}{5}ight)y	ext{ m}.$$

$$	ext{New Area = }\left( rac{36}{25}ight)xy	ext{ m}^2.$$

$$	ext{The difference between the original area = }xy	ext{ and new-area } rac{36}{25}xy	ext{ is}$$
$$=  rac{36}{25}xy - xy$$
$$= xy\left( rac{36}{25} - 1ight)$$
$$= xy\left( rac{11}{25}ight)	ext{ or }\left( rac{11}{25}ight)xy$$

$$	ext{Increase \% = }\left( rac{44}{100}ight)	ext{ or }44\%.$$

question: $$	ext{A rectangular park 60 m long and 40 m wide has two concrete crossroads running in the middle of the park and rest of the park has been used as a lawn. If the area of the lawn is 2109 sq. m, then what is the width of the road?}$$ A. $$	ext{2.91 m}$$ B. $$	ext{3 m}$$ C. $$	ext{5.82 m}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$Area\ of\ the\ park\ = (60 	imes 40) m^2 = 2400 m^2.$$
$$Area\ of\ the\ lawn\ = 2109 m^2.$$
$$Area\ of\ the\ crossroads\ = (2400 - 2109) m^2 = 291 m^2.$$
$$Let\ the\ width\ of\ the\ road\ be\ x\ metres.\ Then,$$
$$60x + 40x - x^2 = 291$$
$$x^2 - 100x + 291 = 0$$
$$(x - 97)(x - 3) = 0$$
$$x = 3.$$

question: $$	ext{The diagonal of a rectangle is 41 cm and its area is 20 sq. cm. The perimeter of the rectangle must be:}$$ A. $$	ext{9 cm}$$ B. $$	ext{18 cm}$$ C. $$	ext{20 cm}$$ D. $$	ext{41 cm}$$

question: $$	ext{The difference between the length and breadth of a rectangle is 23 m. If its perimeter is 206 m, then its area is:}$$ A. $$	ext{1520 m}^2$$ B. $$	ext{2420 m}^2$$ C. $$	ext{2480 m}^2$$ D. $$	ext{2520 m}^2$$

question: $$	ext{13. The length of a rectangular plot is 20 metres more than its breadth. If the cost of fencing the plot @ 26.50 per metre is Rs. 5300, what is the length of the plot in metres?}$$ A. $$40$$ B. $$	ext{50}$$ C. $$120$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$

question: $$	ext{5. A hollow iron pipe is 21 cm long and its external diameter is 8 cm. If the thickness of the pipe is 1 cm and iron weighs 8 g/cm}^3	ext{, then the weight of the pipe is:}$$ A. $$	ext{3.6 kg}$$ B. $$	ext{3.696 kg}$$ C. $$	ext{36 kg}$$ D. $$	ext{36.9 kg}$$

$$

$$
	ext{Weight of iron} = (462 	imes 8) 	ext{ gm} = 3696 	ext{ gm} = 3.696 	ext{ kg}.
$$

question: $$	ext{A boat having a length 3 m and breadth 2 m is floating on a lake. The boat sinks by 1 cm when a man gets on it. The mass of the man is:}$$ A. $$	ext{12 kg}$$ B. $$	ext{60 kg}$$ C. $$	ext{72 kg}$$ D. $$	ext{96 kg}$$

$$

question: $$	ext{7. If 50 men took a dip in a water tank 40 m long and 20 m broad on a religious day, and the average displacement of water by a man is 4 m}^3	ext{, then the rise in the water level in the tank will be:}$$ A. $$	ext{20 cm}$$ B. $$	ext{25 cm}$$ C. $$	ext{35 cm}$$ D. $$	ext{50 cm}$$

question: $$	ext{The slant height of a right circular cone is 10 m and its height is 8 m. Find the area of its curved surface.}$$ A. $$	ext{30}\pi 	ext{ m}^2$$ B. $$	ext{40}\pi 	ext{ m}^2$$ C. $$	ext{60}\pi 	ext{ m}^2$$ D. $$	ext{80}\pi 	ext{ m}^2$$
answer:

$$	ext{h} = 8 	ext{ m}.$$
So, $$	ext{r} = \sqrt{	ext{l}^2 - 	ext{h}^2} = \sqrt{(10)^2 - 8^2} = 6 	ext{ m}.$$
Curved surface area = $$\pi 	ext{rl} = (\pi 	imes 6 	imes 10) 	ext{ m}^2 = 60\pi 	ext{ m}^2.$$

question: $$	ext{A cistern 6 m long and 4 m wide contains water up to a depth of 1 m 25 cm. The total area of the wet surface is:}$$ A. $$	ext{49 m}^2$$ B. $$	ext{50 m}^2$$ C. $$	ext{53.5 m}^2$$ D. $$	ext{55 m}^2$$

$$	ext{Area of the wet surface} = 49 	ext{ m}^2.$$

question: $$	ext{A metallic sheet is of rectangular shape with dimensions 48 m x 36 m. From each of its corners, a square is cut off so as to make an open box. If the length of the square is 8 m, the volume of the box (in m}^3	ext{) is:}$$ A. $$4830$$ B. $$5120$$ C. $$	ext{6420}$$ D. $$	ext{8960}$$

question: $$	ext{The curved surface area of a cylindrical pillar is 264 m}^2	ext{ and its volume is 924 m}^3	ext{. Find the ratio of its diameter to its height.}$$ A. $$3 : 7$$ B. $$ rac{7}{3}$$ C. $$6 : 7$$ D. $$	ext{7 : 6}$$

$$	ext{Required ratio} =  rac{2r}{h} =  rac{14}{6} = 7 : 3.$$

question: $$	ext{12. A cistern of capacity 8000 litres measures externally 3.3 m by 2.6 m by 1.1 m and its walls are 5 cm thick. The thickness of the bottom is:}$$ A. $$	ext{90 cm}$$ B. $$	ext{1 dm}$$ C. $$	ext{1 m}$$ D. $$	ext{1.1 cm}$$

question: $$	ext{14. A large cube is formed from the material obtained by melting three smaller cubes of 3, 4 and 5 cm side. What is the ratio of the total surface areas of the smaller cubes and the large cube?}$$ A. $$ rac{2}{1}$$ B. $$ rac{3}{2}$$ C. $$	ext{25 : 18}$$ D. $$ rac{27}{20}$$

question: $$	ext{15. How many bricks, each measuring 25 cm x 11.25 cm x 6 cm, will be needed to build a wall of 8 m x 6 m x 22.5 cm?}$$ A. $$	ext{5600}$$ B. $$	ext{6000}$$ C. $$6400$$ D. $$	ext{7200}$$

question: $$	ext{From a group of 7 men and 6 women, five persons are to be selected to form a committee so that at least 3 men are there on the committee. In how many ways can it be done?}$$ A. $$564$$ B. $$645$$ C. $$735$$ D. $$756$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Required number of ways} =  inom{7}{3} 	imes  inom{6}{2} +  inom{7}{4} 	imes  inom{6}{1} +  inom{7}{5}$$

$$= \left( rac{7 	imes 6 	imes 5}{3 	imes 2 	imes 1} 	imes  rac{6 	imes 5}{2 	imes 1}ight) + \left( inom{7}{3} 	imes  inom{6}{1}ight) +  inom{7}{2}$$

$$= 525 + \left( rac{7 	imes 6 	imes 5}{3 	imes 2 	imes 1} 	imes 6ight) + \left( rac{7 	imes 6}{2 	imes 1}ight)$$

$$= (525 + 210 + 21)$$

$$= 756.$$

question: $$	ext{In how many different ways can the letters of the word 'LEADING' be arranged in such a way that the vowels always come together?}$$ A. $$	ext{360}$$ B. $$480$$ C. $$	ext{720}$$ D. $$5040$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer: 答案是:C 解析如下: $$ ext{The word 'LEADING' has 7 different letters.}$$ $$ ext{When the vowels EAI are always together, they can be supposed to form one letter.}$$ $$ ext{Then, we have to arrange the letters LNDG (EAI).}$$ $$ ext{Now, 5 (4 + 1 = 5) letters can be arranged in 5! = 120 ways.}$$ $$ ext{The vowels (EAI) can be arranged among themselves in 3! = 6 ways.}$$ $$ ext{Required number of ways = (120 x 6) = 720.}$$ $$ ext{Video Explanation: https://youtu.be/WCEF3iW3H2c}$$

question: $$	ext{In how many different ways can the letters of the word 'CORPORATION' be arranged so that the vowels always come together?}$$ A. $$	ext{810}$$ B. $$1440$$ C. $$	ext{2880}$$ D. $$50400$$ E. $$	ext{5760}$$

$$Required \ number \ of \ ways = (2520 \ x \ 20) = 50400.$$

question: $$	ext{Out of 7 consonants and 4 vowels, how many words of 3 consonants and 2 vowels can be formed?}$$ A. $$210$$ B. $$1050$$ C. $$	ext{25200}$$ D. $$21400$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Number of ways of selecting (3 consonants out of 7) and (2 vowels out of 4)} =  inom{7}{3} 	imes  inom{4}{2}$$

$$=  rac{7 	imes 6 	imes 5}{3 	imes 2 	imes 1} 	imes  rac{4 	imes 3}{2 	imes 1} = 210.$$

$$	ext{Number of groups, each having 3 consonants and 2 vowels} = 210.$$

$$	ext{Number of ways of arranging 5 letters among themselves} = 5! = 5 	imes 4 	imes 3 	imes 2 	imes 1 = 120.$$

$$	ext{Required number of ways} = (210 	imes 120) = 25200.$$

question: $$	ext{5. In how many ways can the letters of the word 'LEADER' be arranged?}$$ A. $$72$$ B. $$144$$ C. $$	ext{360}$$ D. $$	ext{720}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$

question: $$	ext{In a group of 6 boys and 4 girls, four children are to be selected. In how many different ways can they be selected such that at least one boy should be there?}$$ A. $$159$$ B. $$	ext{194}$$ C. $$	ext{205}$$ D. $$	ext{209}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Required number of ways} = \left( {6 \choose 1} 	imes {4 \choose 3} ight) + \left( {6 \choose 2} 	imes {4 \choose 2} ight) + \left( {6 \choose 3} 	imes {4 \choose 1} ight) + {6 \choose 4}$$
$$= \left( 6 	imes 4 ight) + \left(  rac{6 	imes 5}{2 	imes 1} 	imes  rac{4 	imes 3}{2 	imes 1} ight) + \left(  rac{6 	imes 5 	imes 4}{3 	imes 2 	imes 1} 	imes 4 ight) + \left(  rac{6 	imes 5}{2 	imes 1} ight)$$
$$= (24 + 90 + 80 + 15)$$
$$= 209.$$

question: $$	ext{7. How many 3-digit numbers can be formed from the digits 2, 3, 5, 6, 7 and 9, which are divisible by 5 and none of the digits is repeated?}$$ A. $$5$$ B. $$10$$ C. $$15$$ D. $$20$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Since each desired number is divisible by 5, so we must have 5 at the unit place. So, there is 1 way of doing it.}$$
$$	ext{The tens place can now be filled by any of the remaining 5 digits (2, 3, 6, 7, 9). So, there are 5 ways of filling the tens place.}$$
$$	ext{The hundreds place can now be filled by any of the remaining 4 digits. So, there are 4 ways of filling it.}$$
$$	ext{Required number of numbers = (1 x 5 x 4) = 20.}$$

question: $$	ext{In how many ways a committee, consisting of 5 men and 6 women can be formed from 8 men and 10 women?}$$ A. $$	ext{266}$$ B. $$5040$$ C. $$11760$$ D. $$	ext{86400}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$

question: $$	ext{A box contains 2 white balls, 3 black balls and 4 red balls. In how many ways can 3 balls be drawn from the box, if at least one black ball is to be included in the draw?}$$ A. $$	ext{32}$$ B. $$48$$ C. $$64$$ D. $$96$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Required number of ways} = \left( {3 \choose 1} 	imes {6 \choose 2} ight) + \left( {3 \choose 2} 	imes {6 \choose 1} ight) + {3 \choose 3}$$

$$= \left( 3 	imes  rac{6 	imes 5}{2 	imes 1} ight) + \left(  rac{3 	imes 2}{2 	imes 1} 	imes 6 ight) + 1$$

$$= (45 + 18 + 1)$$

$$= 64.$$

question: $$	ext{10. In how many different ways can the letters of the word 'DETAIL' be arranged in such a way that the vowels occupy only the odd positions?}$$ A. $$	ext{32}$$ B. $$48$$ C. $$	ext{36}$$ D. $$	ext{60}$$ E. $$120$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{There are 6 letters in the given word, out of which there are 3 vowels and 3 consonants.}$$
$$	ext{Let us mark these positions as under:}$$
$$	ext{(1) (2) (3) (4) (5) (6)}$$
$$	ext{Now, 3 vowels can be placed at any of the three places, marked 1, 3, 5.}$$
$$	ext{Number of ways of arranging the vowels = } {^3P_3} = 3! = 6.$$
$$	ext{Also, the 3 consonants can be arranged at the remaining 3 positions.}$$
$$	ext{Number of ways of these arrangements = } {^3P_3} = 3! = 6.$$
$$	ext{Total number of ways = (6 x 6) = 36.}$$

question: $$	ext{In how many ways can a group of 5 men and 2 women be made out of a total of 7 men and 3 women?}$$ A. $$63$$ B. $$90$$ C. $$	ext{126}$$ D. $$45$$ E. $$135$$

question: $$	ext{12. How many 4-letter words with or without meaning, can be formed out of the letters of the word, 'LOGARITHMS', if repetition of letters is not allowed?}$$ A. $$	ext{40}$$ B. $$	ext{400}$$ C. $$5040$$ D. $$	ext{2520}$$

question: $$	ext{In how many different ways can the letters of the word 'MATHEMATICS' be arranged so that the vowels always come together?}$$ A. $$10080$$ B. $$4989600$$ C. $$120960$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$

question: $$	ext{In how many different ways can the letters of the word 'OPTICAL' be arranged so that the vowels always come together?}$$ A. $$	ext{120}$$ B. $$	ext{720}$$ C. $$4320$$ D. $$2160$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$

question: $$	ext{It is being given that (2^{32} + 1) is completely divisible by a whole number. Which of the following numbers is completely divisible by this number?}$$ A. $$(2^{16} + 1)$$ B. $$(2^{16} - 1)$$ C. $$(7 	imes 2^{23})$$ D. $$(2^{96} + 1)$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$2^{32} = x.$$
$$(2^{32} + 1) = (x + 1).$$
Let $(x + 1)$ be completely divisible by the natural number N. Then,
$$2^{96} + 1 = [(2^{32})^{3} + 1] = (x^{3} + 1) = (x + 1)(x^{2} - x + 1),$$
which is completely divisible by N, since $(x + 1)$ is divisible by N.

question: $$	ext{26. The difference between a positive proper fraction and its reciprocal is 9/20. The fraction is:}$$ A. $$3 \div 5$$ B. $$ rac{3}{10}$$ C. $$4 \div 5$$ D. $$4 \div 3$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the required fraction be } x. 	ext{ Then}$$
$$ egin{array}{cccc}
1 & - & x & = \
& & x & 20
\end{array}$$
$$ egin{array}{cccc}
& & 1 - x^2 & = \
& & x & 20
\end{array}$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 20 - 20x^2 = 9x$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 20x^2 + 9x - 20 = 0$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 20x^2 + 25x - 16x - 20 = 0$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 5x(4x + 5) - 4(4x + 5) = 0$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } (4x + 5)(5x - 4) = 0$$
$$	ext{Thus, } x =  rac{4}{5}$$

question: $$	ext{On dividing a number by 56, we get 29 as remainder. On dividing the same number by 8, what will be the remainder?}$$ A. $$4$$ B. $$5$$ C. $$6$$ D. $$	ext{7}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Formula: (Divisor*Quotient) + Remainder = Dividend.}$$
$$	ext{Soln:}$$
$$(56*Q)+29 = D \quad 	ext{-------(1)}$$
$$D\%8 = R \quad 	ext{-------------(2)}$$

$$	ext{From equation(2),}$$
$$((56*Q)+29)\%8 = R.$$

$$	ext{Assume Q = 1.}$$
$$	ext{Then,}$$
$$(56+29)\%8 = R.$$
$$85\%8 = R$$
$$5 = R.$$

question: $$	ext{28. If } n 	ext{ is a natural number, then }(6n^2 + 6n) 	ext{ is always divisible by:}$$ A. $$	ext{6 only}$$ B. $$	ext{6 and 12 both}$$ C. $$	ext{12 only}$$ D. $$	ext{by 18 only}$$

question: $$	ext{On dividing a number by 5, we get 3 as remainder. What will the remainder when the square of the this number is divided by 5?}$$ A. $$0$$ B. $$	ext{1}$$ C. $$2$$ D. $$4$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the number be } x 	ext{ and on dividing } x 	ext{ by 5, we get } k 	ext{ as quotient and 3 as remainder.}$$
$$	ext{Then, } x = 5k + 3$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } x^2 = (5k + 3)^2$$
$$= (25k^2 + 30k + 9)$$
$$= 5(5k^2 + 6k + 1) + 4$$
$$	ext{On dividing } x^2 	ext{ by 5, we get 4 as remainder.}$$

$$	ext{Let the number of terms be } n. 	ext{ Then } t_n = 996.$$
$$	ext{ } a + (n - 1)d = 996$$
$$	ext{ } 102 + (n - 1) 	imes 6 = 996$$

question: $$	ext{33. How many natural numbers are there between 23 and 100 which are exactly divisible by 6?}$$ A. $$8$$ B. $$11$$ C. $$12$$ D. $$13$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$

$$\Rightarrow (n - 1) 	imes 6 = 72$$

$$	ext{Required number of numbers = 13}.$$

question: $$	ext{On dividing a number by 357, we get 39 as remainder. On dividing the same number 17, what will be the remainder?}$$ A. $$0$$ B. $$3$$ C. $$5$$ D. $$11$$

$$= (17 \cdot 21 \cdot y) + (17 \cdot 2) + 5$$
$$= 17 \cdot (21y + 2) + 5)$$
$$	ext{Required remainder = 5.}$$

 & 1 - 12 \

question: $$	ext{55.}~	ext{Which of the following numbers will completely divide}~(49^{15} - 1)~?$$ A. $$	ext{8}$$ B. $$	ext{14}$$ C. $$46$$ D. $$	ext{50}$$

答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Given sum} = 9 +  rac{3}{4} + 7 +  rac{2}{17} - \left(9 +  rac{1}{15}ight)$$

$$	ext{Given sum} = 7 +  rac{817}{1020}$$

question: $$	ext{61. When a number is divided by 13, the remainder is 11. When the same number is divided by 17, then remainder is 9. What is the number?}$$ A. $$339$$ B. $$	ext{349}$$ C. $$	ext{369}$$ D. $$	ext{Data inadequate}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$x = 13p + 11 \quad 	ext{and} \quad x = 17q + 9$$
$$13p + 11 = 17q + 9$$
$$17q - 13p = 2$$
$$q =  rac{2 + 13p}{17}$$
The least value of \(p\) for which \(q\) is a whole number is \(p = 26\)
$$x = (13 	imes 26 + 11)$$
$$= (338 + 11)$$
$$= 349$$

question: $$	ext{(1}^2	ext{ + 2}^2	ext{ + 3}^2	ext{ + ... + 10}^2	ext{)} = ?$$ A. $$	ext{330}$$ B. $$	ext{345}$$ C. $$	ext{365}$$ D. $$	ext{385}$$

答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{We know that }(1^2 + 2^2 + 3^2 + ... + n^2) =  rac{n(n + 1)(2n + 1)}{6}$$

$$	ext{Putting } n = 10, 	ext{ required sum } =  rac{1}{6} 	imes 10 	imes 11 	imes 21 = 385$$

question: $$	ext{81. The difference of the squares of two consecutive even integers is divisible by which of the following integers?}$$ A. $$3$$ B. $$4$$ C. $$6$$ D. $$	ext{7}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the two consecutive even integers be } 2n 	ext{ and } (2n + 2).$$
$$	ext{Then,}$$
$$(2n + 2)^2 = (2n + 2 + 2n)(2n + 2 - 2n)$$
$$= 2(4n + 2)$$
$$= 4(2n + 1),$$
$$	ext{which is divisible by 4}.$$

question: $$	ext{Which one of the following is a prime number?}$$ A. $$119$$ B. $$	ext{187}$$ C. $$	ext{247}$$ D. $$	ext{551}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:E 解析如下: $$	ext{551} > 22$$

$$	ext{All prime numbers less than 24 are : 2, 3, 5, 7, 11, 13, 17, 19, 23.}$$

$$119 	ext{ is divisible by } 7; 187 	ext{ is divisible by } 11; 247 	ext{ is divisible by } 13 	ext{ and } 551 	ext{ is divisible by } 19.$$

$$	ext{So, none of the given numbers is prime.}$$

question: $$	ext{The sum of all even natural numbers between 1 and 31 is:}$$ A. $$16$$ B. $$128$$ C. $$	ext{240}$$ D. $$512$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Required sum} = (2 + 4 + 6 + \ldots + 30)$$
$$	ext{This is an A.P. in which } a = 2, d = (4 - 2) = 2, 	ext{ and } l = 30.$$
$$	ext{Let the number of terms be } n.$$
$$t_n = 30 \Rightarrow a + (n - 1)d = 30$$
$$\Rightarrow 2 + (n - 1) \cdot 2 = 30$$
$$\Rightarrow n - 1 = 14$$
$$\Rightarrow n = 15$$

$$	ext{Sum } S_n =  rac{n(a + l)}{2} =  rac{15 \cdot (2 + 30)}{2} = 240.$$

question: $$	ext{What is the unit digit in}(7^{95} - 3^{58})?$$ A. $$0$$ B. $$4$$ C. $$6$$ D. $$	ext{7}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Unit digit in } 7^{95} = 	ext{Unit digit in } [(7^4)^{23} 	imes 7^3]$$
$$ = 	ext{Unit digit in } [(2401)^{23} 	imes 343]$$
$$ = 	ext{Unit digit in } (1^{23} 	imes 343)$$
$$ = 	ext{Unit digit in } (343)$$
$$ = 3$$

$$	ext{Unit digit in } 3^{58} = 	ext{Unit digit in } [(3^4)^{14} 	imes 3^2]$$
$$ = 	ext{Unit digit in } [(81)^{14} 	imes 3^2]$$
$$ = 	ext{Unit digit in } [(1)^{14} 	imes 3^2]$$
$$ = 	ext{Unit digit in } (1 	imes 9)$$
$$ = 	ext{Unit digit in } (9)$$
$$ = 9$$

$$	ext{Unit digit in } (7^{95} - 3^{58}) = 	ext{Unit digit in } (343 - 9) = 	ext{Unit digit in } (334) = 4.$$

$$	ext{So, Option B is the answer.}$$

question: $$	ext{95. The smallest 5 digit number exactly divisible by 41 is:}$$ A. $$1004$$ B. $$10004$$ C. $$10045$$ D. $$10025$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
$$	ext{96.}~	ext{How many terms are there in the G.P. 3, 6, 12, 24, ..., 384?}$$ A. $$8$$ B. $$	ext{9}$$ C. $$10$$ D. $$11$$ E. $$7$$

$$a = 3 \quad 	ext{and} \quad r = 2.$$

Let the number of terms be $n$.

Then, $t_n = 384 \implies ar^{n-1} = 384$

question: $$	ext{97.}~	ext{If } x 	ext{ and } y 	ext{ are positive integers such that }(3x + 7y) 	ext{ is a multiple of 11, then which of the following will be divisible by 11?}$$ A. $$4x + 6y$$ B. $$	ext{x} + 	ext{y} + 4$$ C. $$9x + 4y$$ D. $$4x - 9y$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{(3x + 7y) = (3 \cdot 5 + 7 \cdot 1) = 22, which is divisible by 11.}$$
$$	ext{(4x + 6y) = (4 \cdot 5 + 6 \cdot 1) = 26, which is not divisible by 11;}$$
$$	ext{(x + y + 4) = (5 + 1 + 4) = 10, which is not divisible by 11;}$$
$$	ext{(9x + 4y) = (9 \cdot 5 + 4 \cdot 1) = 49, which is not divisible by 11;}$$
$$	ext{(4x - 9y) = (4 \cdot 5 - 9 \cdot 1) = 11, which is divisible by 11.}$$

question: $$	ext{The sum of even numbers between 1 and 31 is:}$$ A. $$6$$ B. $$	ext{28}$$ C. $$	ext{240}$$ D. $$	ext{512}$$
answer:

$$	ext{Let the number of terms be } n. 	ext{ Then,}$$

question: $$	ext{106. If } x 	ext{ and } y 	ext{ are the two digits of the number 653}x y 	ext{ such that this number is divisible by 80, then } x + y = ?$$ A. $$	ext{2 or 6}$$ B. $$4$$ C. $$4 	ext{ or } 8$$ D. $$8$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$

$$	ext{Now, 653}	extit{x}	ext{ is divisible by 8, so 13}	extit{x}	ext{ should be divisible by 8.}$$
$$	ext{This happens when }	extit{x}	ext{ = 6.}$$
$$	ext{Therefore, }	extit{x}	ext{ + }	extit{y}	ext{ = (6 + 0) = 6.}$$

question: $$	ext{107. The difference of the squares of two consecutive odd integers is divisible by which of the following integers?}$$ A. $$3$$ B. $$6$$ C. $$7$$ D. $$8$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the two consecutive odd integers be }(2n + 1)	ext{ and }(2n + 3).$$
$$	ext{Then},$$
$$(2n + 3)^2 - (2n + 1)^2 = (2n + 3 + 2n + 1)(2n + 3 - 2n - 1)$$
$$= (4n + 4) 	imes 2$$
$$= 8(n + 1),$$
$$	ext{which is divisible by 8}.$$

question: $$118. 	ext{The sum of all two digit numbers divisible by 5 is:}$$ A. $$1035$$ B. $$1245$$ C. $$1230$$ D. $$945$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$

question: $$	ext{If the number 653 } 	extit{xy} 	ext{ is divisible by 90, then } (	extit{x} + 	extit{y}) = ?$$ A. $$2$$ B. $$	ext{3}$$ C. $$4$$ D. $$6$$

$$	ext{Hence, }(	extit{x}	ext{ + }	extit{y}	ext{) = (4 + 0) = 4.$$

question: $$	ext{129.}~	ext{Which of the following numbers will completely divide}~(4^{61} + 4^{62} + 4^{63} + 4^{64})~?$$ A. $$3$$ B. $$10$$ C. $$11$$ D. $$13$$

$$	ext{131. A number when divided successively by 4 and 5 leaves remainders 1 and 4 respectively. When it is successively divided by 5 and 4, then the respective remainders will be}$$ A. $$	ext{1, 2}$$ B. $$	ext{2, 3}$$ C. $$	ext{3, 2}$$ D. $$4, 1$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$ egin{array}{c|c}
4 & x & y = (5 	imes 1 + 4) = 9 \
\hline
5 & y - 1 & x = (4 	imes y + 1) = (4 	imes 9 + 1) = 37 \
\hline
 & 1 & -4
\end{array}$$

Now, 37 when divided successively by 5 and 4, we get

$$ egin{array}{c|c}
5 & 37 \
\hline
4 & 7 - 2 \
\hline
 & 1 - 3
\end{array}$$

Respective remainders are 2 and 3.

question: $$	ext{The difference between a two-digit number and the number obtained by interchanging the positions of its digits is 36. What is the difference between the two digits of that number?}$$ A. $$3$$ B. $$4$$ C. $$9$$ D. $$	ext{Cannot be determined}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$Let\ the\ ten's\ digit\ be\ x\ and\ unit's\ digit\ be\ y.$$
$$Then,\ (10x + y) - (10y + x) = 36$$
$$9(x - y) = 36$$
$$x - y = 4.$$

question: $$	ext{4. The difference between a two-digit number and the number obtained by interchanging the digits is 36. What is the difference between the sum and the difference of the digits of the number if the ratio between the digits of the number is 1 : 2 ?}$$ A. $$	ext{4}$$ B. $$8$$ C. $$	ext{16}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$
	ext{Since the number is greater than the number obtained on reversing the digits, so the ten's digit is greater than the unit's digit.}
$$
$$
	ext{Let ten's and unit's digits be } 2x 	ext{ and } x 	ext{ respectively.}
$$
$$
	ext{Then, } (10 	imes 2x + x) - (10x + 2x) = 36
$$
$$
\implies 9x = 36
$$
$$
\implies x = 4
$$
$$
	ext{Required difference = } (2x + x) - (2x - x) = 2x = 8
$$

question: $$	ext{A two-digit number is such that the product of the digits is 8. When 18 is added to the number, then the digits are reversed. The number is:}$$ A. $$	ext{18}$$ B. $$	ext{24}$$ C. $$42$$ D. $$81$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the ten's and unit digit be } x 	ext{ and}$$
$$	ext{respectively.}$$
$$	ext{Then,}$$
$$\left(10x + 8ight) + 18 = 10 	imes 8 + x$$
$$\Rightarrow 10x^2 + 8 + 18x = 80 + x^2$$
$$\Rightarrow 9x^2 + 18x - 72 = 0$$
$$\Rightarrow x^2 + 2x - 8 = 0$$
$$\Rightarrow (x + 4)(x - 2) = 0$$
$$\Rightarrow x = 2.$$

question: $$6. 	ext{The sum of the digits of a two-digit number is 15 and the difference between the digits is 3. What is the two-digit number?}$$ A. $$	ext{69}$$ B. $$	ext{78}$$ C. $$	ext{96}$$ D. $$	ext{Cannot be determined}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the ten's digit be } x 	ext{ and unit's digit be } y.$$
$$	ext{Then, } x + y = 15 	ext{ and } x - y = 3 	ext{ or } y - x = 3.$$
$$	ext{Solving } x + y = 15 	ext{ and } x - y = 3, 	ext{ we get: } x = 9, y = 6.$$
$$	ext{Solving } x + y = 15 	ext{ and } y - x = 3, 	ext{ we get: } x = 6, y = 9.$$
$$	ext{So, the number is either 96 or 69}.$$
$$	ext{Hence, the number cannot be determined.}$$

question: $$	ext{The sum of the squares of three numbers is 138, while the sum of their products taken two at a time is 131. Their sum is:}$$ A. $$	ext{20}$$ B. $$	ext{30}$$ C. $$40$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the numbers be } a, b 	ext{ and } c.$$
$$a^2 + b^2 + c^2 = 138 	ext{ and } (ab + bc + ca) = 131.$$
$$(a + b + c)^2 = a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + 2(ab + bc + ca) = 138 + 2 	imes 131 = 400.$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } (a + b + c) = \sqrt{400} = 20.$$
$$	ext{Video Explanation: } \href{https://youtu.be/qmJ-0X8j_xQ}{	ext{https://youtu.be/qmJ-0X8j_xQ}}$$

question: $$	ext{A number consists of two digits. If the digits interchange places and the new number is added to the original number, then the resulting number will be divisible by:}$$ A. $$3$$ B. $$5$$ C. $$9$$ D. $$11$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$Let\ the\ ten's\ digit\ be\ x\ and\ unit's\ digit\ be\ y.$$
$$Then,\ number\ =\ 10x\ +\ y.$$
$$Number\ obtained\ by\ interchanging\ the\ digits\ =\ 10y\ +\ x.$$
$$(10x\ +\ y)\ +\ (10y\ +\ x)\ =\ 11(x\ +\ y),\ which\ is\ divisible\ by\ 11.$$

question: $$	ext{In a two-digit number, if it is known that its unit's digit exceeds its ten's digit by 2 and that the product of the given number and the sum of its digits is equal to 144, then the number is:}$$ A. $$	ext{24}$$ B. $$	ext{26}$$ C. $$42$$ D. $$46$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the ten's digit be } x.$$
$$	ext{Then, unit's digit = } x + 2.$$
$$	ext{Number = } 10x + (x + 2) = 11x + 2.$$
$$	ext{Sum of digits = } x + (x + 2) = 2x + 2.$$
$$	ext{(11}x + 2)(2x + 2) = 144$$
$$	ext{22}x^2 + 26x - 140 = 0$$
$$	ext{11}x^2 + 13x - 70 = 0$$
$$	ext{(}x - 2)(11x + 35) = 0$$
$$	ext{ }x = 2.$$
$$	ext{Hence, required number = 11}x + 2 = 24.$$

question: $$	ext{Find a positive number which when increased by 17 is equal to 60 times the reciprocal of the number.}$$ A. $$	ext{3}$$ B. $$10$$ C. $$	ext{17}$$ D. $$20$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the number be } x.$$

$$	ext{Then, } x + 17 = 60 \div x$$

$$	ext{Hence, } x^2 + 17x - 60 = 0$$

$$	ext{Thus, } (x + 20)(x - 3) = 0$$

$$	ext{Therefore, } x = 3.$$

question: $$	ext{11. The product of two numbers is 9375 and the quotient, when the larger one is divided by the smaller, is 15. The sum of the numbers is:}$$ A. $$	ext{380}$$ B. $$	ext{395}$$ C. $$400$$ D. $$425$$
$$	ext{The product of two numbers is 120 and the sum of their squares is 289. The sum of the number is:}$$ A. $$	ext{20}$$ B. $$	ext{23}$$ C. $$	ext{169}$$ D. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the numbers be } x 	ext{ and } y.$$
$$x y = 120 	ext{ and } x^2 + y^2 = 289.$$
$$(x + y)^2 = x^2 + y^2 + 2xy = 289 + (2 	imes 120) = 529$$
$$x + y = \sqrt{529} = 23.$$

question: $$	ext{A number consists of 3 digits whose sum is 10. The middle digit is equal to the sum of the other two and the number will be increased by 99 if its digits are reversed. The number is:}$$ A. $$	ext{145}$$ B. $$	ext{253}$$ C. $$	ext{370}$$ D. $$352$$

question: $$14. 	ext{The sum of two numbers is 25 and their difference is 13. Find their product.}$$ A. $$104$$ B. $$114$$ C. $$315$$ D. $$325$$
$$	ext{What is the sum of two consecutive even numbers, the difference of whose squares is 84?}$$ A. $$34$$ B. $$38$$ C. $$	ext{42}$$ D. $$46$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the numbers be } x 	ext{ and } x + 2.$$

$$\implies 4x = 80$$
$$\implies x = 20.$$
$$	ext{The required sum = } x + (x + 2) = 2x + 2 = 42.$$

question: $$	ext{Six bells commence tolling together and toll at intervals of 2, 4, 6, 8 10 and 12 seconds respectively. In 30 minutes, how many times do they toll together?}$$ A. $$4$$ B. $$10$$ C. $$15$$ D. $$	ext{16}$$

question: $$	ext{14. The price of commodity } X 	ext{ increases by 40 paise every year, while the price of commodity } Y 	ext{ increases by 15 paise every year. If in 2001, the price of commodity } X 	ext{ was Rs. 4.20 and that of } Y 	ext{ was Rs. 6.30, in which year commodity } X 	ext{ will cost 40 paise more than the commodity } Y 	ext{ ?}$$ A. $$	ext{2010}$$ B. $$	ext{2011}$$ C. $$	ext{2012}$$ D. $$	ext{2013}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Suppose commodity } X 	ext{ will cost 40 paise more than } Y 	ext{ after } z 	ext{ years.}$$
$$	ext{Then, (4.20 + 0.40z) - (6.30 + 0.15z) = 0.40}$$
$$	ext{Therefore, } 0.25z = 0.40 + 2.10$$
$$	ext{Thus, } z =  rac{2.50}{0.25} = 10$$
$$	ext{Hence, } X 	ext{ will cost 40 paise more than } Y 	ext{ 10 years after 2001 } i.e., 	ext{ 2011.}$$

question: $$	ext{There are two examinations rooms A and B. If 10 students are sent from A to B, then the number of students in each room is the same. If 20 candidates are sent from B to A, then the number of students in A is double the number of students in B. The number of students in room A is:}$$ A. $$	ext{20}$$ B. $$	ext{80}$$ C. $$	ext{100}$$ D. $$	ext{200}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the number of students in rooms A and B be } x 	ext{ and } y 	ext{ respectively.}$$
$$	ext{Then, } x - 10 = y + 10 \quad \Rightarrow \quad x - y = 20 \quad 	ext{ .... (i)}$$
$$	ext{ and } x + 20 = 2(y - 20) \quad \Rightarrow \quad x - 2y = -60 \quad 	ext{ .... (ii)}$$
$$	ext{Solving (i) and (ii) we get: } x = 100, y = 80.$$
$$	ext{The required answer A = 100.}$$

question: $$	ext{The price of 10 chairs is equal to that of 4 tables. The price of 15 chairs and 2 tables together is Rs. 4000. The total price of 12 chairs and 3 tables is:}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 3500}$$ B. $$Rs. 3750$$ C. $$Rs. 3840$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 3900}$$
answer:
答案是:D 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the cost of a chair and that of a table be Rs. }x	ext{ and Rs. }y	ext{ respectively}.$$

$$10x = 4y \quad 	ext{or} \quad y =  rac{5}{2}x.$$

$$15x + 2y = 4000$$

$$\Rightarrow 15x + 2 \left( rac{5}{2}xight) = 4000$$

$$\Rightarrow 20x = 4000$$

$$\Rightarrow x = 200.$$

$$	ext{So, }y = \left( rac{5}{2}ight) 	imes 200 = 500.$$

$$	ext{Hence, the cost of 12 chairs and 3 tables = }12x + 3y$$

$$\quad = 	ext{Rs. }(2400 + 1500)$$

$$\quad = 	ext{Rs. }3900.$$

question: $$	ext{The price of 2 sarees and 4 shirts is Rs. 1600. With the same money one can buy 1 saree and 6 shirts. If one wants to buy 12 shirts, how much shall he have to pay ?}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 1200}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 2400}$$ C. $$Rs. 4800$$ D. $$	ext{Cannot be determined}$$ E. $$	ext{None of these}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the price of a saree and a shirt be Rs. }x	ext{ and Rs. }y	ext{ respectively.}$$
$$	ext{Then, }2x + 4y = 1600 	ext{ .... (i)}$$
$$	ext{and }x + 6y = 1600 	ext{ .... (ii)}$$

$$	ext{Divide equation (i) by 2, we get the below equation.}$$
$$= 	ext{>} x + 2y = 800. 	ext{ --- (iii)}$$

$$	ext{Now subtract (iii) from (ii)}$$
$$x + 6y = 1600 	ext{ (-)}$$
$$x + 2y = 800$$
$$----------------$$
$$4y = 800$$
$$----------------$$
$$	ext{Therefore, }y = 200.$$

$$	ext{Now apply value of }y	ext{ in (iii)}$$
$$= 	ext{>} x + 2 	imes 200 = 800$$
$$= 	ext{>} x + 400 = 800$$
$$	ext{Therefore }x = 400$$

$$	ext{Solving (i) and (ii) we get }x = 400, y = 200.$$
$$	ext{Cost of 12 shirts = Rs. (12 x 200) = Rs. 2400.}$$

question: $$	ext{A sum of Rs. 1360 has been divided among A, B and C such that A gets }  rac{1}{2} 	imes  rac{2}{3} 	ext{ of what B gets and B gets }  rac{1}{1} 	imes  rac{1}{4} 	ext{ of what C gets. B's share is:}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 120}$$ B. $$	ext{Rs. 160}$$ C. $$	ext{Rs. 240}$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 300}$$

$$

$$

$$
x + 2x + x = 1360
$$

$$

$$

$$
\Rightarrow 17x = 1360 	imes 12
$$

$$

question: $$	ext{7. One-third of Rahul's savings in National Savings Certificate is equal to one-half of his savings in Public Provident Fund. If he has Rs. 1,50,000 as total savings, how much has he saved in Public Provident Fund?}$$ A. $$	ext{Rs. 30,000}$$ B. $$Rs. 50,000$$ C. $$	ext{Rs. 60,000}$$ D. $$	ext{Rs. 90,000}$$
answer:
答案是:C 解析如下: $$x 	ext{ and } (150000 - x) 	ext{ be the savings in N.S.C and P.P.F. respectively.}$$

$$ rac{x}{3} =  rac{150000 - x}{2}$$

$$ rac{x}{3} +  rac{x}{2} = 75000$$

$$ rac{5x}{6} = 75000$$

$$x =  rac{75000 	imes 6}{5} = 90000$$

$$	ext{Savings in Public Provident Fund} = 150000 - 90000 = 60000$$

question: $$8. 	ext{A fires 5 shots to B's 3 but A kills only once in 3 shots while B kills once in 2 shots. When B has missed 27 times, A has killed:}$$ A. $$	ext{30 birds}$$ B. $$	ext{60 birds}$$ C. $$	ext{72 birds}$$ D. $$	ext{90 birds}$$
answer:
答案是:A 解析如下: $$	ext{Let the total number of shots be } x. 	ext{ Then,}$$

$$	ext{Shots fired by A = }  rac{5x}{8}$$

$$	ext{Shots fired by B = }  rac{3x}{8}$$

$$	ext{Killing shots by A = }  rac{1}{5} 	imes 5x =  rac{5x}{24}$$

$$	ext{Shots missed by B = }  rac{1}{2} 	imes  rac{3x}{8} =  rac{3x}{16}$$

$$	ext{Solving for } x, 	ext{ we have } 3x = 27 	imes 16 \Rightarrow x = 144$$

$$	ext{Birds killed by A = }  rac{5x}{24} =  rac{5 	imes 144}{24} = 30$$

question: $$	ext{11. In a regular week, there are 5 working days and for each day, the working hours are 8. A man gets Rs. 2.40 per hour for regular work and Rs. 3.20 per hours for overtime. If he earns Rs. 432 in 4 weeks, then how many hours does he work for?}$$ A. $$	ext{160}$$ B. $$175$$ C. $$180$$ D. $$	ext{195}$$
answer:
答案是:B 解析如下: $$	ext{Suppose the man works overtime for } x 	ext{ hours.}$$
$$	ext{Now, working hours in 4 weeks = (5 x 8 x 4) = 160.}$$
$$	ext{160 x 2.40 + } x 	ext{ x 3.20 = 432}$$
$$	ext{3.20} x 	ext{ = 432 - 384 = 48}$$
$$	ext{ } x 	ext{ = 15.}$$
$$	ext{Hence, total hours of work = (160 + 15) = 175.}$$

question: $$	ext{12. Free notebooks were distributed equally among children of a class. The number of notebooks each child got was one-eighth of the number of children. question: $$	ext{13. A man has some hens and cows. If the number of heads be 48 and the number of feet equals 140, then the number of hens will be:}$$ A. $$22$$ B. $$	ext{23}$$ C. $$24$$ D. $$	ext{26}$$

question: $$	ext{What should come in place of both } x 	ext{ in the equation } x =  rac{162}{128} \cdot x.$$ A. $$12$$ B. $$14$$ C. $$144$$ D. $$196$$
